title: Personal Assistant
description:
Who We Are



Market Leaders is a coaching and marketing education brand on a mission to become world-renowned by 2031. We blend Asian wisdom with global standards, operating as a 7-person remote team that values "Peaceful & Profitable" culture—high performance without toxic hustle.



We need a proactive Personal Assistant to be the operational backbone that keeps everything running flawlessly.



The Opportunity



This isn't a typical VA role. You'll anticipate needs before they're voiced, solve problems before they escalate, and ensure our executive operates at peak effectiveness across time zones.



If you thrive on complexity and take pride in zero-error execution, this is your role.



What You'll Do



Manage executive calendar with zero conflicts

Handle all
 correspondence professionally, responding within 2 hours

Coordinate customer onboarding from inquiry to activation

Solve problems proactively - anticipate challenges and eliminate chaos

Bridge operations across creative teams, clients, and leadership

What You Bring



Must-Haves:



2+ years executive assistant experience

Expert Google Calendar/scheduling across time zones

Excellent written and verbal English

CRM/customer management experience

Proactive problem-solver who anticipates needs

High attention to detail, zero tolerance for errors

Reliable home office setup, stable internet (Philippines-based)

Singapore Time Zone availability (GMT+8), flexible hours

Nice-to-Haves:



Project management tools (Asana, Notion, Trello)

AI productivity tools knowledge

Culture Fit (Critical)



We don't hire brilliant jerks. You're a fit if you:

Team First - Collaboration over ego, celebrate others' wins

High Performance, Zero Drama - Reliable, organized, sustainable excellence

Never Stop Evolving - Continuous learner, improve yourself and processes

Thrive on Complexity - Energized by multiple priorities and fast pace

Take Ownership - Self-directed, no hand-holding needed

Compensation:



Probation: SGD $700/month (2 months)



Post-Probation: SGD $
/month (PHP 30,000-34,000)



Annual increases based on performance

title: Experienced Graphic Designer / Photo Retoucher
description:
We’re hiring an experienced Graphic Designer and Photo Retoucher with real estate experience who understands how to create clean, professional, high-converting visuals across digital and print.



This role is for someone who knows how to design with clarity and purpose. You understand branding, layout, hierarchy, and how visuals influence attention and trust, especially in real estate marketing.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Team Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just managing marketing campaigns for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have real estate design experience and understand what makes listings visually credible and market-ready? Do you know how to design social posts and brochures that look clean, professional, and on-brand without overcomplicating them? Do you move fast when timelines are tight and still pay attention to spacing, alignment, and small details?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Social & Digital Design

- Design YouTube branding assets including thumbnails, banners, and episode graphics.

- Create Instagram listing posts, announcements, ads, and story graphics.

- Develop and maintain branded social templates for consistent output.



Print Design

- Design real estate yard signs and signage.

- Create listing brochures and marketing flyers.

- Prepare clean, print-ready files with correct sizing and bleed settings.



Real Estate Photo Editing

- Edit listing photos for lighting, color correction, and clarity.

- Clean up images by removing distractions and enhancing presentation.

- Ensure final images look professional while remaining realistic.



Brand Consistency & Organization

- Maintain consistent fonts, colors, and layout standards

- Ensure all visuals align with company branding

- Organize design files clearly for future use



Requirements:

- Proven experience in real estate graphic design, required

- Strong portfolio showing real estate social and print work, required

- Experience with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Lightroom), or similar tools

- Strong understanding of layout, spacing, and visual hierarchy

- Experience preparing print-ready files

- Experience editing real estate photos

- Ability to work quickly without sacrificing quality

- Strong communication skills

- Ability to follow brand guidelines

- A stable, high-speed internet connection

- Growth mindset



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)

- Light motion graphics

- Understanding of social media performance metrics

- Basic copy awareness (headline spacing, readability, CTA placement)



NOTE: This is a project-based role with the opportunity to grow into a full-time position for the right person.



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.







STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Graphic Designer with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: SALES REPRESENTATIVE (COLD CALLING & CLOSING) – REMOTE
description:
Everluxe Property Care | Sydney, Australia



Everluxe Property Care is a rapidly growing premium commercial and residential cleaning company based in Sydney, Australia.



We specialise in high-standard property care services across:



Commercial facilities

Real estate and strata

Childcare centres

Gyms and warehouses

Residential end-of-lease and deep cleaning



Due to continued growth, we are expanding our sales team and are seeking a high-performance Sales Representative to join us remotely.



ROLE OVERVIEW



This is a results-driven outbound sales role focused on cold calling, lead generation, and closing opportunities across both commercial and residential sectors.



You will be responsible for engaging decision-makers, presenting our services professionally, and converting leads into booked jobs and long-term contracts.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Conduct a minimum of 250 outbound cold calls per day

Engage with:

Builders and construction companies

Real estate agencies and property managers

Childcare centres

Pharmacies and retail businesses

Commercial property operators

Residential clients

Identify client needs and present tailored cleaning solutions

Qualify leads and book appointments or close sales directly

Follow structured sales scripts and internal processes

Accurately track calls, outcomes, and follow-ups

Maintain a professional, confident, and results-focused approach at all times

WORK SCHEDULE

Monday to Friday

Start time: 5:30 AM (Philippines time)

Minimum 40 hours per week

Additional hours may be required based on workload and performance

COMPENSATION & GROWTH

Base salary: $400 USD per month

Paid weekly: $100 USD

Performance-based salary increases

Opportunity to progress into senior sales and closing roles

Long-term growth within an expanding international company

CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS

Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)

Previous sales or call centre experience preferred

Ability to handle high call volumes consistently

Comfortable managing rejection and maintaining performance

Strong work ethic, discipline, and reliability

Ability to take feedback and implement improvements quickly

Stable internet connection and professional work environment

IMPORTANT: SUITABILITY



This is a high-performance role suited to individuals who are:



Self-motivated and goal-oriented

Comfortable working in a structured, target-driven environment

Focused on long-term growth and skill development



This role is not suitable for candidates seeking low-pressure or passive work.



APPLICATION PROCESS (MANDATORY)



To be considered, applicants must send a WhatsApp message to:




Please answer all of the following questions:



What is the highest number of cold calls you have made in one day?

Why are you willing to make 250 cold calls per day?

How do you handle rejection repeatedly?

Describe your previous sales or call centre experience.

What time will you wake up daily to start at 5:30 AM PH time?

What makes you different from most applicants?

Are you seeking comfort or growth? Explain.

Can you start immediately?



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



INTERVIEW PROCESS

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a WhatsApp video interview (commencing immediately)

Candidates will be assessed on communication, professionalism, and sales ability

ABOUT EVERLUXE PROPERTY CARE



Everluxe Property Care is committed to delivering premium, reliable, and scalable cleaning solutions across Sydney.



We pride ourselves on:



Professional systems and processes

High-quality service standards

Long-term client relationships

Continuous growth and expansion

title: Executive Assistant / Project Manager
description:
We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Team Admin / Executive Assistant / Project Manager to support leadership and keep the team operating smoothly.



This role is for someone who thinks in systems, spots gaps before they become problems, stays ahead of deadlines, and keeps the entire team aligned without needing constant supervision. You are here to support leadership, manage projects, and keep systems running smoothly so the rest of the team can focus on execution.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems, high standards, and real impact, not just managing tasks for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning scattered ideas into structured plans with clear owners and deadlines? Are you the type who follows up before being asked and catches details others miss? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting processes properly, and keeping teams aligned without constant supervision?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Admin & Team Support

- Manage calendars, meetings, follow-ups, and reminders

- Handle inbox organization and message triage

- Prepare documents, trackers, and internal updates

- Keep files, folders, and naming systems clean and consistent



Project Management

- Track ongoing projects, deadlines, and dependencies

- Break down tasks and assign owners

- Follow up on deliverables and flag risks early

- Keep project boards and trackers up to date (e.g. Notion, Monday, ClickUp, Sheets)



Systems & Process

- Build and improve simple systems that reduce back-and-forth

- Document SOPs and workflows as things evolve

- Spot inefficiencies and automation opportunities, and suggest, design, and implement improvements

- Maintain dashboards, trackers, and recurring reports



Communication & Coordination

- Act as the bridge between leadership and the team

- Clarify priorities and next steps after meetings

- Ensure instructions are understood and executed correctly

- Keep everyone aligned without micromanaging



REQUIREMENTS:

Experience & Capability

- Must have extensive experience as an executive assistant, chief of staff, or operations associate

- Project management experience and comfortable managing and driving multiple large projects

- Must have previous experience managing people. You may not have any direct reports, but the experience is important

- Must have experience automating workflows and designing workflow processes with automation in mind. You may not be individually responsible for building them, but you should already have the experience to handle basic tasks and understand how the process works

- Comfortable with outcome and goal-based delegation and does not need to be told individual tasks

- Experience with Google Suite and GoHighLevel CRM is a plus, but not required

- Should be fluent in AI, but not reliant on it to think for you



Work Style & Standards

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Excellent organizational skills

- Excellent time management skills

- Strong written communication

- Strong written and spoken English communication skills; near-native level preferred

- Comfortable juggling multiple priorities

- Must love creating, refining, and working with standard operating processes (SOPs)

- Proactive. You don’t wait to be told something is broken, you anticipate it before it breaks

- Must move with a sense of speed and urgency in everything



Ownership & Mindset

- Extremely growth-oriented and hungry to learn

- You are the type of person who follows through every single time, no matter what, and always gets the job done. No excuses, no matter what pops up

- You are the type of person who is delighted when the client or the person you're preparing something for is delighted

- You want meaningful work around people who are incredibly smart, hard-working, and dedicated, with a phenomenal culture. We work hard, but we have fun doing it together



Availability & Technical Requirements

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION IS REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Must be willing to work long hours and be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (not necessarily working 12 hours a day, but reliably reachable and able to respond quickly if something urgent comes up)



Preferred:

- Experience working as a process engineer, manufacturing engineer, or industrial engineer is preferred, but not required

- Experience designing team workflows, augmenting existing workflows with automation, and/or automating existing workflows is a strong bonus, but not required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.





STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project, estimated to be 2-3 hours of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Team Admin / Assistant / Project Manager with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: B2B Sales Development Representative and Business Development Representative
description:
We are hiring 1 SDR and 1 BDR ASAP!!!



If you're looking for easy, low-pressure work where you send a few
s and collect a paycheck—close this tab now.

But if you're a hunter—someone who thrives on the phone, gets energy from real conversations, handles rejection like a pro, and wants to actually earn based on results—keep reading.



About Us: 

We provide software solutions to car dealerships across the United States. 



100+ active dealership clients – this isn't a startup guessing at product-market fit

13+ years of founder experience running buy centers

500+ product demos conducted by the founder personally



You'll be calling US car dealers—Used Car Managers, Acquisition Managers, General Managers—the people who d
 what tools their dealership buys. These are busy, direct, no-BS businesspeople. If you can earn their attention, you can earn real money here.



Key Responsibilities:



We're hiring for two distinct roles. Read both descriptions carefully and apply for the one that fits your skills and experience. If you're not sure, apply for SDR—top performers get promoted to BDR.

SDR – Sales Development Representative

"The Hunter" | High-Volume Outbound Calling

Your Mission: Fill the top of the funnel. Make 60–80+ calls per day. Find decision-makers. Qualify leads. Pass them to BDRs.

You're great at: Cold calling, handling rejection, getting past gatekeepers, researching contacts, high-volume work.

You're NOT doing: Demos, proposals, closing. You hand off qualified leads to BDRs.

Best for: People who love the grind, have thick skin, and want to prove themselves.

BDR – Business Development Representative

"The Closer's Partner" | Pipeline & Relationship Management

Your Mission: Convert qualified leads into booked demos. Follow up relentlessly. Help get contracts signed.

You're great at: Building relationships, managing pipelines, persistent follow-up, professional communication.

You're NOT doing: Product demos or price negotiations. The founder does all demos and closing. You book meetings, prep materials, chase paperwork.

Best for: People with sales experience who want to work fewer accounts at higher stakes.



Requirements/Qualifications:



Compensation Structure:



You get a guaranteed base every month—no clawbacks. Commission is uncapped. The harder you work, the more you earn. 



SDR (Sales Development Representative)

Guaranteed Base Salary: $1,200 -$1,500/month

Target OTE (On-Target Earnings): $1,800 – $2,200/month

Top Performer OTE: $2,400+/month

Growth Path: Promoted to BDR



BDR (Business Development Representative)

Guaranteed Draw: $1,500 - $2,000/month

Target OTE (On-Target Earnings): $3,000 – $4,000/month

Top Performer OTE: $4,000+/month

Growth Path: Senior BDR / Team Lead



How to Apply:

Take an online assessment through this link- 



The assessment includes written questions and audio responses. Please ensure you answer all questions and upload your CV as an attachment.



Important: The audio assessment is a required first step in our hiring process. It allows us to evaluate your English fluency and communication skills. Only candidates who meet all qualifications will move forward to the next stage.

title: Key Account Manager (Sales)
description:
| Global Sourcing | B2B Sales | Product Procurement 



About the Role

You close. You build. You own your book of business and you're proud of it. This isn't a role for someone who waits for leads to land in their lap. As a Key Account Manager at 
, you're the tip of the spear you prospect, you pitch, you negotiate, and you close. You'll be handling high-stakes conversations with procurement teams and business owners who need reliable global sourcing partners, and you'll be the person who turns those conversations into signed contracts. 



Once a deal is done, you don't hand it off and move on, you're the quarterback of the client relationship, connecting them to our product sourcing and logistics teams to make sure delivery on what you promised. This role comes with a competitive base pay plus commissions on every deal you close. The upside is real and so is the accountability. 



What You'll Be Doing



Strategic Business Development: Build your own pipeline. Partner with the Sales & Marketing Manager and Marketing team on targeted lead generation campaigns - but you know how to hunt independently too. Identify, qualify, and pursue new business opportunities across industries that rely on bulk product sourcing. 



Targeted Industry Sourcing: While we can technically source anything from China, you will actively target bulk B2B buyers specifically within high-demand sectors such as healthcare (hospital beds, wheelchairs, PPE), renewable energy (solar equipment and supplies), commercial furniture, security (CCTV), IT hardware, etc.



Enterprise Negotiation & Deal Closing: Lead pricing negotiations for bulk orders, long-term contracts, and recurring procurement deals. Navigate complex procurement cycles with multiple stakeholders without losing 
ntum. Own the process from first contact through to contract signature - you're not handing this off mid-way. Develop and present tailored sourcing proposals and pricing strategies that work for both the client and 
. 



Client Relationship Management: Serve as the primary point of contact for your clients from contract signing onward. Act as the liaison between clients and our product sourcing and logistics teams. Proactively manage expectations, flag delays or issues before they become problems, and always show up with solutions. Build long-term relationships that drive repeat business, upsells, and referrals. 



Quota & Leadership: Hit monthly and quarterly revenue quotas this is non-negotiable. Maintain an accurate and updated pipeline in the CRM at all times. Provide regular forecasting and deal updates to the Sales & Marketing Manager. 



You're a Great Fit If You...

-Have 7-10 years of senior B2B sales experience, ideally in trading, wholesale, procurement, logistics, or a related field.

-Possess a strong, existing network of bulk buyers and key decision-makers in the Philippines across our core target industries: medical and healthcare facilities, renewable energy, commercial real estate/furniture, and IT/security infrastructure.

-Can confidently engage C-suite and senior procurement stakeholders. 

-Know how to negotiate without burning bridges - you're firm, fair, and smart about it. 

-Are comfortable with ambiguity you figure things out, you don't wait to be told. 

-Have strong communication and follow-through. Are self-driven and take full accountability for your pipeline and results. 



Nice to Have

-Direct experience managing high-volume import/export sales from China to the Philippines.

-Existing network and Deep familiarity with local Philippine market dynamics and regulations for importing medical equipment, solar tech, CCTV, and IT hardware.

-Experience closing high-value deals far exceeding the $50K-$500K+ range.

-Familiarity with freight, logistics, and supply chain basics.



What We Offer



-Competitive base salary we respect your time and experience. 

-Commission on every deal you close no cap. 

-A real product to sell: end-to-end global sourcing that genuinely helps businesses cut costs and source smarter. 

-A lean, fast-moving team where your wins are visible and celebrated. 

-Room to grow - as we scale, the people who built the business will be first in line for bigger opportunities.

title: Ninja Marketing Assistance For  Fast Growing Business
description:
About the Role



We're looking for a sharp, proactive Marketing Assistant to support the growth of Digital Brand Builders and our wider portfolio. You'll work directly alongside the founding team, helping execute across paid advertising, funnels, content, and marketing operations. This is a hands-on role — perfect for someone who wants to be in the engine room of a fast-moving digital business, not just scheduling posts.

We're at the cutting edge of AI adoption in how we run and grow our brands. We use AI tools daily across content, research, copywriting, and operations — and we expect this person to be the same way. If you're already experimenting with AI to work faster and smarter, you'll fit right in.



Key Responsibilities



Meta Ads & Paid Traffic



- Assist in setting up, monitoring, and reporting on Meta 
/Instagram) ad campaigns

- Pull performance data from Ads Manager and flag opportunities or issues

- Organise ad creative assets — copy, images, video — for testing cycles

- Help manage audiences, pixel events, and campaign structures



Funnel & Conversion Support



- Assist in building and updating landing pages and funnels (Kartra or similar)

- Monitor key funnel metrics: opt-in rates, cost per lead, conversion rates

- Coordinate funnel assets including forms, thank-you pages, and
 sequences

- Support A/B testing by documenting variants and collating results



Content & Marketing Operations



- Help schedule and publish content across social channels

- Assist in producing marketing materials: ad copy,
 drafts, lead magnets

- Maintain the marketing calendar and ensure deadlines are met

- Keep asset folders, trackers, and dashboards organised and up to date



AI-Assisted Workflows



- Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, and others) to accelerate content creation, research, and reporting

- Help identify and implement AI-driven efficiencies across marketing tasks

- Stay curious about new AI tools and bring ideas for how we can apply them in the business



Reporting & Analysis



- Compile weekly performance reports across ads, funnels, and

- Maintain marketing dashboards (Google Sheets or similar)

- Flag what's working and what needs attention based on the data





What We're Looking For



Basic working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager (campaign setup, reading metrics)

Familiarity with funnel tools — Kartra, ClickFunnels, or equivalent

Comfortable using AI tools in day-to-day work (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) — we expect AI to be part of your workflow, not an afterthought

Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tasks

A learner's mindset — eager to understand why things work, not just execute tasks

Good written communication skills

Experience with Google Sheets / basic spreadsheet skills





Nice to Have



Experience with
 marketing platforms (ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, etc.)

Basic understanding of direct response copywriting

Exposure to e-commerce or high-ticket coaching businesses

Experience using AI for content creation, research, or workflow automation

Curiosity about emerging AI tools and how they can be applied to marketing — we're actively building AI into our systems and want someone who gets excited by that, not intimidated





What You'll Get



Direct mentorship from experienced digital entrepreneurs

Exposure to the full lifecycle of a digital marketing business

Fast-paced environment where your work has real, measurable impact

A front-row seat to how a modern, AI-first marketing operation is built

Opportunity to grow into a more senior marketing or operations role

title: Claude Code and AI Automation Expert
description:
About the Role

We're not looking for someone who's read about AI automation. We're looking for someone who's already building with it.

Digital Brand Builders is a fast-moving digital business operating across e-commerce, high-ticket coaching, and marketing. We've gone all-in on AI as an operational layer — and we're looking for an expert to help us build, automate, and scale using Claude Code and the broader AI tooling ecosystem.

This is a ground-floor opportunity to shape how an entrepreneurial organisation uses AI — not maintain legacy systems, but architect new ones.



What You'll Be Building

Claude Code & Agentic Workflows



Design and build agentic workflows using Claude Code for real business tasks — research, content, ops, outreach, and more

Connect Claude to our existing tools and data sources via MCP servers and APIs

Build multi-step AI pipelines that reduce manual work across the business



Automation & Integration



Automate repetitive marketing, sales, and operations tasks using AI-native tooling

Integrate AI workflows with our CRM (Close),
 platforms, funnel tools (Kartra), and Google Workspace

Build internal tools, dashboards, and scripts that make the team faster



AI Systems & Infrastructure



Maintain and improve our growing library of prompts, agents, and automations

Identify high-leverage opportunities where AI can replace or augment manual processes

Document systems so the wider team can use and build on them



Staying Ahead of the Curve



Monitor the latest developments in AI tooling — models, APIs, frameworks — and bring relevant innovations to the business

Test and evaluate new tools before they become mainstream

Be the person in the room who's already used the thing everyone else just heard about





What We're Looking For



Hands-on experience with Claude Code and the Anthropic API

Strong understanding of agentic AI systems, prompt engineering, and multi-step pipelines

Comfortable working with APIs, webhooks, and integration tools (Zapier, Make, or custom)

Ability to write clean, functional code — Python and/or JavaScript preferred

Experience with MCP servers or building custom Claude tool integrations is a strong plus

Self-directed — you don't need hand-holding, you need a problem and a deadline

Entrepreneurial mindset — you think in systems, not tasks





Nice to Have



Experience with other frontier AI tools — OpenAI, Gemini, Perplexity, Cursor, etc.

Background in marketing, e-commerce, or sales operations

Familiarity with CRMs, funnel builders, or
 automation platforms

Experience building internal tools or lightweight SaaS products

Active presence in AI communities — you're learning in public, sharing what you find





What You'll Get



Work directly with founders who are actively building at the frontier of AI adoption

Real creative and technical autonomy — we won't slow you down with committees

A business with genuine use cases across marketing, sales, ops, and e-commerce — plenty to build

Competitive compensation with room to grow as the role grows

The satisfaction of building things that actually get used





If your idea of a good day is shipping an AI workflow that saves the team hours every week — we want to hear from you.

title: Bookkeepeer & Trust Accountant
description:
Blambles Finance Group – Bookkeeper (Xero & Property Trust Accounting)



Who we are

We are a Brisbane-based boutique firm active since 2017, spanning commercial property buyers agency, commercial property finance broking, and residential mortgage broking. We are expanding into general insurance broking and commercial property management. Our mission is to help individuals and businesses build wealth via property. This role supports growth and works closely with our Filipino-based virtual assistants (currently 4) and Australian staff (currently 3).



Three core functions

- Bookkeeping (Xero): bank reconciliations, AP/AR, expense coding (utilising HubDoc), payroll, BAS support, and client ledgers

- Management accounting: financial reporting, variance analysis, budgeting support, and performance reporting

- Property trust accounting: recording/reconciling trust receipts and disbursements, trust account records, regulatory compliance for trust funds, onboarding of clients/suppliers



Key requirements

- Xero bookkeeping experience (practice and/or client bookkeeping), including reconciliations, AP/AR, BAS support, and payroll

- Management accounting and reporting experience

- Property management trust accounting knowledge (trust receipts/disbursements, trust banking, statutory compliance)

- Highly proficient in Microsoft Office 365, with excellent Excel skills

- Excellent English communication (written and oral)

- Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to prioritise competing tasks/deadlines

- Stable employment history

- Ability to work independently and with a remote team



You will be rewarded with

- 100% remote role (work from home)

- Competitive remuneration, discretionary bonus, and public holiday/annual leave

- Flexible working environment with Australian-based hours (AEST)

- Collaboration with Filipino support contractors and Australian staff

- Opportunity to influence Xero bookkeeping and property management processes and systems



Key responsibilities

- Bookkeeping (Xero):

  - Bank reconciliations, accounts payable/receivable, expense coding (HubDoc)

  - BAS preparation support and reporting

  - Maintaining accurate client ledgers and financial records

  - Payroll for Australian-based staff and contractors in the Philippines

- Management accounting:

  - Prepare and support financial reporting and analysis

  - Assist with budgeting and performance reporting

- Property trust accounting:

  - Record and reconcile trust receipts and disbursements

  - Maintain trust account records in line with relevant regulations

  - Onboard new clients and suppliers

  - Ensure exemplary customer service to stakeholders

- Compliance:

  - Adhere to internal/external policies, procedures, and applicable laws (including Privacy Act 1988 and Australian Privacy Principles)

- Other duties:

  - Ad hoc tasks and projects as required

  - Complete tasks accurately and on time

  - Training and career progression opportunities



Qualifications and selection criteria (minimum)

- Relevant accounting qualifications

- Proven Xero bookkeeping experience (reconciliations, AP/AR, BAS support)

- Familiarity with property management (commercial preferred) and trust accounting

- Strong Microsoft Office 365 skills, especially Excel

- Excellent written and verbal English

- Self-motivated, proactive, and able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines

- Clean disciplinary history and stable employment history

- Willingness to coordinate with our Filipino-based team



To apply

Please
 
 with the subject: BFG job application – Bookkeeper & Trust Accountant

Enclose your resume and a cover letter addressing:

- Availability to start

- Evidence of current internet speed

- Evidence of current computer hardware/system specs

- Willingness to supply your own internet, laptop, and headset

- Why you want this role

- Why you are a good fit based on past experience

- Current remuneration and expected remuneration



Online assessment

Please complete the short online test: 
/s/x9adrflu



Notes

- Only shortlisted applicants who meet minimum criteria and score well in the online test will be contacted.

- You will typically hear back within 7 days if shortlisted; otherwise, your application has been unsuccessful.

- Do not apply via OnlineJobs

title: Remote Customer Service Representative (US Hours)
description:
We are looking for motivated, reliable, and professional individuals to join our growing remote team as Customer Service Representatives. This is a great opportunity to work with a US-based company from the comfort of your own home.



About the Role



As a Customer Service Representative, you will be the front line of communication between our company and customers or clients. You will handle outbound and/or inbound calls, assist with inquiries, gather information, and ensure every interaction is handled with professionalism and care. Specific assignments and projects may vary based on business needs — successful agents may be placed on different accounts and campaigns as they become available.



Key Responsibilities



Handle outbound and/or inbound calls in a professional and courteous manner

Communicate clearly and effectively with English-speaking clients and customers

Follow call scripts, workflows, and company guidelines

Accurately document call outcomes and information

Meet performance benchmarks and maintain a good attendance record

Adapt to different account types and campaign requirements as assigned



Schedule



Days and hours will vary depending on the client and account assigned

All shifts are aligned to US time zones (Eastern, Central, Mountain, or Pacific)

Primarily covering afternoon to overnight Philippine time

Flexibility and the ability to adjust to different schedules is a plus

Training & Onboarding



Paid training provided prior to going live

Full support during onboarding to set you up for success



Probation Period



First 30 days is a probationary period

Salary increases available based on attendance and performance after probation



Requirements



Fluent, clear spoken and written English — this is non-negotiable

Reliable, stable internet connection

Computer running Windows 11 Pro

Noise-cancelling headset

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for professional calls

Ability to commit to a consistent US-hour night shift schedule

Positive attitude and strong work ethic



Compensation



Starting salary: $26,500 monthly, paid bi-weekly

Salary increase opportunities after the 30-day probation based on productivity and attendance

Competitive pay with room to grow as more accounts become available



How to Apply

To be considered, please submit a voice recording introducing yourself and demonstrating your English communication skills. Applications WITHOUT a voice note will NOT be considered.

Apply now and be first in line when new accounts open up!

title: Video Editor / Creative Strategist (Performance-Based Pay + Free Courses Included)
description:
About Us

We're a performance creative agency that produces direct-response video ads for US-based health and supplement brands. Our clients spend real budgets on the ads we make — which means when your work performs, you earn more.

We're looking for a video editor who wants to grow into a Creative Strategist — someone who doesn't just cut footage, but learns to think about why an ad works and builds the instinct to create ads that sell.



The Role

You'll start by editing short-form video ads (UGC-style, direct response) using scripts, AI tools, and briefs we provide. Over time, you'll develop into a full Creative Strategist — learning how to research markets, develop angles, and build ad concepts from scratch.



Schedule & Time Zone

We don't care when you work — as long as your daily output is delivered and you make the Saturday strategy call. You manage your own hours.

Daily output: 1 ad concept with 3 video variations.



You'll use AI and structured prompts for scripting and iteration, upload deliverables to Google Drive, log everything in our tracking sheet, and join weekly strategy calls. This is a system — you follow the process, use the frameworks, hit your output, and you earn.



How You Get Paid

You earn 2.5% of the first $10,000 in revenue generated by each ad concept you create.

That's up to $250 per winning concept.

At 5+ concepts per week, you're getting 20+ shots on goal every month. You don't need every concept to win. You need a few. And as your skill improves, your hit rate goes up — and so does your income.

There is no monthly cap. The more winners you produce, the more you make.

Revenue is tracked transparently in a shared sheet and payments are made bi-weekly.



What You Get Beyond Pay

Access to premium direct-response and copywriting courses (valued at thousands of dollars) — included free as part of the role

Hands-on training in performance creative strategy — the same skillset US agencies charge $5K–$15K/month for

AI-powered workflow — you'll work with cutting-edge AI tools for scripting, ideation, and review

A real path to growth — you're not stuck editing clips forever. You're building a skillset that compounds



Most editing roles pay you to stay in the same place. This one pays you to get better. You'll understand how ads are built, why they work, and how to create them from scratch. That knowledge compounds whether you stay with us long-term or go on to build something of your own.



This Role Is For You If…

You can edit video cleanly and quickly (Premiere, DaVinci, CapCut — whatever you're fast in)

You want to learn direct-response marketing, not just push pixels

You're reliable, consistent, and can hit a daily output target

You're excited by the idea of getting paid based on results, not hours

You want a long-term role where your earning potential grows as you grow



This Role Is NOT For You If…

You want a fixed salary with no performance component

You're not comfortable with a learning curve

You can't commit to consistent daily output



Final Notes

This is a performance culture.

You get rewarded for speed, output, and results.

If you want to make more, produce more, test more, win more.

The system is here to make sure your pay scales with your impact.



To Apply

Fill out this short form below and link any past work (ads, reels, edits — anything that shows you can cut video).

title: Experienced Civil Case Manager Needed in Georgia
description:
ivil Case Manager  - Georgia

Overview:

We are looking for a meticulous and highly organized Civil Case Manager to join our team in Georgia. This vital role involves managing civil cases from their initiation through to resolution, significantly influencing the quality of service we deliver to our clients. The ideal candidate will have a strong grasp of the civil litigation process and the ability to navigate the intricacies that various cases present.



Key Responsibilities:

1. **Case Oversight**

   - Manage the progression of civil cases to ensure they are resolved in a timely manner.

   - Maintain comprehensive case files, documenting all evidence, correspondence, pleadings, and pertinent materials.

   - Track critical deadlines, including court dates, filing deadlines, and discovery timeframes.



2. **Client Liaison**

   - Act as the main point of contact for clients, providing updates on case status and developments.

   - Gather necessary information and documentation from clients.

   - Address client inquiries to foster a positive experience throughout the legal process.



3. **Legal Assistance**

   - Support attorneys in case preparation, which includes conducting research and drafting legal documents.

   - Prepare legal correspondence, motions, and filings under the guidance of attorneys.

   - Organize materials for hearings, trials, depositions, and meetings.



4. **Administrative Support**

   - Schedule appointments, hearings, and depositions efficiently.

   - Manage attorneys’ calendars, ensuring alignment with court deadlines and meetings.

   - Liaise with courts, opposing counsel, and other entities regarding filings and scheduling.



5. **Document Management**

   - Review, organize, and oversee case-related documents and evidence.

   - Keep case management systems or software updated and effective.

   - File and retrieve documents in both electronic and physical formats as needed.



6. **Research and Review**

   - Conduct legal research to enhance case strategies.

   - Summarize relevant legal precedents, statutes, and regulations for attorney review.

   - Organize and compile information from discovery materials.



7. **Financial Management**

   - Monitor case expenses and maintain accurate billing records.

   - Coordinate with clients on payment arrangements, invoices, and retainer agreements.

   - Assist in tracking attorney billing hours and preparing client invoices.



8. **Compliance and Confidentiality**

   - Ensure all case activities adhere to legal and ethical standards.

   - Uphold the confidentiality of all client and case-related information.



9. **Collaboration with Professionals**

   - Communicate with expert witnesses, investigators, medical professionals, and other consultants involved in cases.

   - Work in conjunction with other departments, such as finance and IT, to address case requirements.



10. **Mentorship and Training**

    - Train junior staff, paralegals, or interns in effective case management practices.

    - Develop and implement best practices and protocols for case management.



**Essential Skills:**

- **Organizational Skills:** Ability to effectively juggle multiple cases, deadlines, and priorities.

- **Communication Skills:** Professional and clear communication with clients, attorneys, and stakeholders.

- **Legal Acumen:** Strong understanding of legal terminology, procedures, and case management tools.

- **Problem-Solving Skills:** Proactively identify and resolve potential issues.

- **Attention to Detail:** Ensure precision in documents, filings, and case timelines.

- **Technological Proficiency:** Familiarity with case management software, e-filing systems, and legal research tools.



If you are a proactive, detail-oriented individual with a passion for civil litigation and client service, we invite you to apply for the Civil Case Manager position and join our dedicated team.

title: Podcast & Marketing Coordinator
description:
About Precision Sourcing Group



Precision Sourcing Group is a Sydney-based recruitment powerhouse, made up of three specialist brands: Precision Sourcing, Vinova, and MediRec. Together, we deliver award-winning staffing solutions across data, technology, renewables, and healthcare.

With a team of 30 and a vibrant office near Wynyard, our culture is built on ubuntu – “I am because we are.” We collaborate, support each other, and celebrate success as a team, ensuring every client and candidate experience is exceptional.



About the Role



We’re looking for a creative, detail-driven Podcast & Marketing Coordinator to own our podcast editing while supporting broader marketing activity. You’ll edit video and audio episodes, repurpose them into high-performing social content, post job ads on LinkedIn, and help deliver paid and organic campaigns that grow our audience and brand.

If you enjoy turning conversations into compelling content and seeing it perform across channels, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities



• Edit video and audio podcast episodes, enhancing sound, pacing, and overall production quality.

• Add branded intros, outros, captions, and graphics, and prepare episodes for distribution across podcast platforms and YouTube.

• Repurpose long-form episodes into short-form, platform-ready clips with strong hooks, subtitles, and motion elements.

• Create, format, post, and maintain job ads across Veritone/Broadbean, the company websites, and LinkedIn, including checking briefs with recruiters, producing or refining ad copy, creating shareable banner assets, and refreshing or closing roles as needed.

• Design and schedule on-brand social media content that supports campaigns and day-to-day activity.

• Support occasional paid social campaigns that drive website traffic and follower growth.

• Assist with in-house marketing collateral and presentations for sales, events, and employer branding.

• Ensure all content is on-brand, accurate, and delivered on time.



What We’re Looking For



• Experience editing both video and audio content, ideally for podcasts or social.

• Strong skills in video and design tools (e.g. Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut, Canva or similar).

• Experience creating short-form social content and basic understanding of paid social.

• Strong attention to detail, organisation, and ability to manage multiple projects.

• A collaborative, proactive mindset and willingness to learn.



Why Join Us?



• Be part of a fast-growing, award-winning recruitment group with a strong, collaborative culture.

• Work on podcasts, social content, and campaigns that shape how our brands show up online.

• Join a supportive marketing team where your ideas and creativity are encouraged.

• Grow your skills across podcast production, social media, and broader digital marketing.

title: AI-Assisted Graphic Designer (Vector Specialist for Laser-Cut Metal Signs)
description:
We are a U.S.-based custo
tal sign company seeking a talented long-term graphic designer.



Your job will be to take customer requests, sketches, or logos, use ChatGPT/AI tools to generate design ideas, and refine them into production-ready black-and-white vector files.



You’ll need to not only bridge and prepare designs for cutting but also use your sense of style and design judgment to create signs that look professional, balanced, and visually appealing — since many signs can be made multiple ways, but only some look great.



All final designs must be fully bridged, connected, and cuttable as one solid piece.



Responsibilities:



Use ChatGPT/AI tools to brainstorm, refine, and sometimes create designs. 



Convert customer-provided artwork or AI-generated concepts into black-and-white vectors.



Use Paint, GIMP, or other drawing tools to manually create/adjust bridges.



Ensure all elements are properly connected so the design cuts as one solid sign.



Apply strong design taste and style to make signs visually appealing.



Redraw or vectorize logos/sketches into clean, sharp vectors when needed.



Deliver files in AI, SVG, and EPS formats.



Requirements:



Strong skills in Adobe Illustrator, CorelDRAW, or similar vector software.



Experience using Paint, GIMP, or similar tools to create bridges.



Solid understanding of laser cutting requirements (bridging, connected pieces).



Good sense of style, balance, and aesthetics — ability to choose layouts that look best.



Experience redrawing/rebuilding logos and sketches into clean vectors.



Comfort using ChatGPT/AI tools in the design process.



Reliable, detail-oriented, and responsive.





Salary Range:



$600+ USD per month (Full-time, 40 hrs/week)



Higher pay possible for strong portfolios + excellent design style.



Benefits:



Long-term, stable work.



Remote position with flexible hours.



Growth opportunities as the company expands.



How to Apply:

Please submit:



A short introduction about yourself.



Samples of black-and-white vector designs with bridges (preferably for laser cutting).



Confirmation you can use Paint/GIMP to create bridges when needed. (A bridge is a line that connects elements together professionally and aesthetically) 



Examples that show your style sense — layouts or designs that demonstrate taste.



Your expected monthly salary in USD.



Test Task (Required):

Take the word “FAMILY” and create a black-and-white vector sign design that:



Uses a decorative font (but still readable).



Has all letters bridged and connected so it cuts as one solid sign.



Is styled in a way that looks balanced, professional, and visually appealing (not just functional).



Show how you used Paint/GIMP (or another drawing tool) to add bridges before finalizing in vector format.



Deliver in  black and white with the sign being black

title: Video & Graphic Designer — Loud Lion
description:
Type: Full-Time | Experience: 5+ Years | Focus: Meta Ads Creative | Location: Remote

About the Role

Loud Lion is a fractional CMO and ecommerce growth agency that builds predictable acquisition systems for 7 and 8-figure DTC brands. We don't just run ads — we engineer revenue. And great creative is at the core of everything we do.

We're looking for an advanced Video & Graphic Designer who thrives at the intersection of performance marketing and visual storytelling. You'll be producing high-volume, conversion-driven creative assets that are directly accountable to real revenue outcomes — not just aesthetics.

This is not a portfolio-builder role. Every asset you create will be tested in live Meta campaigns for 7-figure brands. You'll see exactly what works, what doesn't, and why — with data to prove it.

What You'll Do



Design and produce high-converting video ads and static graphics for Meta 
 & Instagram) campaigns across a portfolio of ecommerce brands

Create 100+ assets per month: UGC-style videos, VSLs, motion graphics, static ad creatives, carousels, and story formats

Translate creative briefs rooted in customer psychology and market research into scroll-stopping visual executions

Generate AI-assisted content using tools like Sora, Kling, Higgsfield, and Freepik to accelerate production and unlock new creative formats

Collaborate directly with our creative strategists to iterate on winning angles and test new hooks rapidly

Maintain brand consistency across client accounts while pushing creative boundaries within performance constraints

Stay current on Meta ad trends, platform best practices, and emerging creative formats

Core Requirements



5+ years of professional experience in video production and graphic design, specifically for direct-response and paid social advertising

Advanced proficiency in video editing — Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or equivalent

Strong command of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) or Figma for static ad creation

Demonstrable track record of creating Meta ad creatives that drove measurable performance results (ROAS, CTR, CPA improvements)

Deep understanding of Meta ad formats, specs, and what makes creative perform on the platform

Experience with motion graphics, typography-driven video, and hook-first video structure

Strong ability to work at high volume without sacrificing quality — speed and craft must coexist

A portfolio that includes real performance creative (not just agency-style brand work)

AI Generation Skills — Required

We're leaning hard into AI-assisted production at Loud Lion. Comfort with the following tools is a requirement, not a nice-to-have:



Sora — OpenAI video generation

Kling — AI video generation

Higgsfield — AI video generation

Freepik — AI image & asset generation

You should be fluent in prompting, editing, and integrating AI-generated footage and imagery into polished final deliverables. We expect these tools to be part of your daily workflow.

Strong Plusses

These aren't required, but candidates with these skills will stand out significantly:



Creative strategy — ability to develop angles, hooks, and messaging frameworks based on customer research

Marketing and direct-response copywriting — writing punchy, conversion-focused headlines and scripts

Experience writing or contributing to creative briefs that connect market insight to visual execution

Understanding of full-funnel ecommerce marketing (acquisition, CRO, retention)

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager and the ability to interpret basic performance data

Experience creating listicle-style visual content or advertorial-adjacent ad formats

Who You Are



You move fast and iterate faster — high volume is not intimidating, it's energizing

You think about creative in terms of performance, not just aesthetics

You're genuinely excited about AI generation tools and stay ahead of what's new

You take feedback without ego and use data to guide creative decisions

You're autonomous, organized, and reliable — we're fully remote and expect you to own your output

You want to work somewhere your work actually matters and is measured against real business outcomes

What We Offer



Full-time, fully remote position

Competitive compensation based on experience

Direct access to performance data — see exactly how your work converts

Fast-paced, collaborative team environment

Work across 7 and 8-figure DTC brands in multiple verticals

Access to premium tools and AI generation subscriptions

Real creative ownership and a seat at the strategy table

How to Apply

Send your portfolio, resume, best way to contact you,  and your favorite superhero in the first sentence of your reply so we know you read the full job post. 

NOTE: Anyone who doesn’t send their favorite superhero will not get a response from us. 

Include:



Portfolio or reel (performance creative preferred)

Examples of Meta ad work with context on results, if available

Brief overview of your AI tool experience

Your availability and desired start date

Loud Lion — Driving Predictable Ecommerce Growth |

title: Shopify Order Processing & Operations Assistant (Part-Time, Long-Term)
description:
We are a growing ecommerce company specializing in custo
tal business signs.



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented assistant to help manage Shopify order processing, file organization, and mockup coordination.



This is a long-term position with stable weekly pay. As the business grows, your responsibilities and hours will grow with it.



SCHEDULE:

• 4 hours per day (guaranteed)

• Monday – Friday

• Split shift preferred:

  - 2 hours morning

  - 2 hours evening

• Occasional weekends during busy seasons (holidays)



TASK:

• Check Shopify orders daily

• Download customer logos from orders

• Create and organize folders in Google Drive

• Upload and manage files using a structured system

• Send design mockups to customers via

• Move files between folders based on order status

• Shopify

• Amazon

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to follow step-by-step processes

• Organized and consistent

• Ecommerce or Shopify experience is a plus



COMPENSTATION:

In the beginning, the workload may take around 2 hours per day, but you will still be paid for the full 4 hours.



As the business grows, the workload will increase and will fully utilize the 4 hours.



• Paid weekly

title: Short Form Meta Ads Video Editor (Performance Focused) – Full Time
description:
We’re an agency looking for a full time video editor who specialises in performance creative, not generic editing. Your mission is to turn raw footage into high converting Meta ads 
/Instagram) that stop the scroll and drive results.



We’ve allocated a strong budget for this role and are only looking for someone who is technically sharp, fast, emotionally intelligent, and highly accountable. We’re not a random e-commerce brand or agency, we’re already generating serious revenue, and this hire is about taking things to the next level.



We are not looking for an average or ‘good’ editor. We want a driven, high-output operator who takes ownership and consistently delivers. This is a long term opportunity, and for the right person, there is real potential to grow into a leadership role and eventually lead our editing team.



What you’ll do

– Edit 5–
 second ad creatives for
, Instagram and other short form platforms, with a focus on strong hooks, tight pacing and clear messaging.

– Produce ad variations weekly, experimenting with multiple hooks, pacing and CTAs to find winners.

– Add captions, dynamic cuts, zooms and motion graphics as needed: optimise aspect ratios and export sizes.

– Work from creative briefs and scripts, suggest improvements and adapt edits based on performance data.

– Collaborate with our creative and media-buying teams: hit deadlines consistently and communicate proactively.





Requirements

– Proven experience editing direct response ads or short form paid social content (Meta/TikTok): you understand why certain edits convert and others don’t.

– Strong grasp of hooks, pacing and viewer retention: ability to create scroll stopping openings.

– Proficient in Premiere Pro, CapCut or similar: After Effects/motion graphics a plus.

– Comfortable working with UGC content and AI assisted tools (Higgsfield, VEO/Sora, etc.) or willing to learn.

– Reliable internet/computer, good English communication and ability to work at least 35 hours/week.





What we offer

– Stable, long term position with room to grow: remote work.

– Base salary $1000–$2500/month (USD) based on experience, with performance based increases and bonuses.

– Paid test project for shortlisted candidates: performance reviews tied to ad results.





How to apply

Do not send generic applications. To be considered, please complete this application form:



 



Only candidates who fill out the form completely will be shortlisted. In the form, you’ll be asked to share your best short form ad examples, explain your editing choices.

title: Social Media and Business Coordinator
description:
Social Media Manager and Business Coordinator (Part-Time or Full-Time)



About Kawi



Kawi is launching Metro Vancouver's first multi-venue fitness booking platform this May. We're making it easy for people to discover and access the best combat sports, yoga, pilates, cycling, and recovery studios across the region with flexible credit-based memberships.



We're at the starting line: building from zero partnerships to launch-ready in 3 months. We need someone who can create the social media presence and community that makes our launch impossible to ignore.



The Mission



Build Kawi's social media presence from the ground up before, during, and after our May launch. You'll be our voice on social - creating content that makes people excited about flexible fitness, documenting our journey, and building a community of fitness enthusiasts who are hungry for this solution.



This is a ground-floor opportunity: You'll have creative freedom to define our social presence and prove your impact as we grow. This is a major growth opportunity at a new business!



What You'll Do



Content Creation (50%)



Create scroll-stopping content for Instagram, TikTok,
 and 

Produce posts, reels, stories, and videos that showcase different fitness verticals (combat sports, yoga, cycling, traditional strength training etc.)

Source and curate content from gym/studio partners and fitness creators

Build anticipation for our May launch through countdowns, teasers, announcements and community engagement

Design graphics and edit videos using templates and mobile tools



Community Building & Outreach (40%)



Grow our following organically through strategic engagement

Interact authentically with fitness enthusiasts, gyms, studios, and athletes across social platforms

Respond to DMs and comments to build relationships before launch

Prospect and reach out to gyms/studios via Instagram DM to introduce Kawi

Send prospecting
s to fitness businesses to gauge partnership interest

Make occasional phone calls to follow up with warm leads and schedule meetings for the founder

Follow and engage with target audience accounts (fitness lovers interested in flexible memberships)

Monitor trending fitness content and jump on relevant trends



Strategy & Reporting (10%)



Track what content performs and optimize accordingly

Maintain a simple content calendar aligned with launch milestones

Weekly check-ins to review analytics and adjust strategy

Keep organized records of outreach efforts and responses



You're a Great Fit If You:



Love fitness - you genuinely get excited about gyms, studios, and the fitness scene

Understand social platforms intuitively - you know what makes people stop scrolling

Are comfortable with outreach - reaching out to new businesses via DM,
, or phone doesn't intimidate you

Can create content independently - we're scrappy, you'll work with stock footage, Canva, and basic editing tools

Thrive in zero-to-one environments - building from scratch excites you, not scares you

Write naturally - your captions and outreach messages don't sound like corporate marketing or from an AI bot, it truly engages with people

Can work autonomously - Direction and scope is given, but you own the execution

Are organized - tracking outreach, content calendars, and multiple tasks simultaneously

Understand the market - You must understand ClassPass's strengths and weaknesses

Video editing skills (CapCut, Canva Video, basic motion graphics)

Experience with fitness/wellness brands or communities

Knowledge of different fitness verticals (not just one set of activities)

Experience with cold outreach or prospecting

Upkeep of current and future social media trends across multiple applications (Instagram, Tiktok, LinkedIn,
)

Comfortable working across multiple time zones

Render designs for documents front-end website



About the role:



Hours: Part-time (20-30 hours/week) or Full-time (40 hours/week)

Schedule: Flexible - work when it makes sense for content creation and engagement and to attend weekly meetings

Location: Fully remote

Start Date: TBD



Growth Opportunity: This is a ground-floor opportunity to join a fast-growing startup. If you perform well during the probationary period, you will transition into a full-time role on the marketing and growth team, with greater ownership and long-term growth potential.



To Apply



Send us an
 or a message with:



Brief intro (3-4 sentences) - Introduce yourself and tell us what excites you about the role!

Portfolio - Links to social accounts you've managed OR samples of content you've created. This can also be a through description of your past roles and work.



Subject line: "Social Media and Business Coordinator - Maz

Send to: 

You may also send this as a message on onlinejobs.ph



What Makes Kawi Different



We're not another corporate fitness app. We're building something that actually solves a real problem: access to the best boutique fitness without getting locked into expensive monthly memberships.



You'd be helping build the brand identity from scratch during the most exciting phase - launch. Your work will directly impact whether we succeed or fail.



If you want to build something real, apply.

title: Growth Marketing, SEO & AI Content Specialist
description:
- Job Overview



We are looking for a highly skilled, independent, fast-moving, and results-driven Growth Marketing, SEO & AI Content Specialist to support the growth of iSpeax Therapy and iSpeax Tech across content, SEO, website publishing, social media,
 marketing, lead generation, AI-assisted production, and campaign execution.



This is not a content posting role.



You will be expected to execute, move quickly, think strategically, produce high-quality work, track results, evaluate performance, and continuously improve outcomes. You must establish clear daily and weekly growth goals, execute against them, assess whether they were achieved, analyze why they were or were not met, and adjust strategy accordingly.



We are looking for someone proficient in growth marketing, SEO, content creation, research, AI, reporting, and digital execution in one pair of hands.



This role will begin part-time at 4 hours per day and may expand to 8 hours per day based on performance and business needs.



 - The Role



You will be responsible for planning, creating, publishing, optimizing, tracking, and improving marketing efforts across both brands.



This is a high-ownership role. You should be able to take a goal, turn it into a plan, execute quickly, measure outcomes, and improve performance over time without needing constant direction.



 - What You’ll Do: Growth Strategy & Execution



Establish clear daily, weekly, and monthly growth goals



Set and track KPIs for follower growth, engagement, website traffic,
 list growth, lead generation, and conversions



Develop and execute growth strategies



Build action plans around defined growth goals and move quickly on execution



Evaluate what is underperforming, what needs to change, and adjust strategy based on performance data



Create and maintain monthly strategy plans aligned with launches, campaigns, offers, and business priorities



Collaborate with founders and team members on campaign direction, priorities, and marketing initiatives



Content Creation & Publishing



Create, write, edit, schedule, and publish high-quality content across social media, blog, website, and
 channels



Write SEO-optimized blog articles



Upload, format, and publish content in Webflow



Repurpose long-form content into captions, reels, stories,
 copy, landing page copy, and short-form marketing assets



Maintain and manage a strategic content calendar



Ensure all content is polished, accurate, on-brand, and aligned with business goals



Support basic video editing for reels, short-form videos, and promotional content



Use AI tools to improve efficiency, ideation, content production, and workflow speed without sacrificing quality



SEO & Website Optimization



Develop and execute SEO-optimized content strategies



Conduct keyword research, topic research, competitor research, and search intent analysis



Optimize blog posts, web pages, landing pages, metadata, headings, internal links, alt text, and calls to action



Improve search visibility, organic traffic, and content discoverability



Support landing page optimization for stronger lead capture and conversion



Monitor SEO performance and identify opportunities for improvement



Social Media Growth & Community Management



Manage and grow social presence across Instagram, TikTok, and other relevant platforms



Focus on weekly follower growth



Create platform-specific content strategies to improve reach, engagement, and audience growth



Conduct hashtag research and social keyword research



Monitor trends, content opportunities, and platform changes



Engage with followers through comments, DMs, story replies, and community interaction



Test content hooks, formats, posting strategies, and engagement tactics to improve growth






 Marketing, Lead Magnets & Campaigns



Grow, organize, segment, and manage
 lists



Create and send newsletters, nurture
s, promotional
s, and marketing campaigns



Use Mailchimp or similar platforms to execute and optimize campaigns



Create lead magnets and list-building offers to support audience growth and lead generation



Build campaigns that support visibility, trust, engagement, and conversion



Monitor campaign performance, including opens, clicks, subscriber growth, and conversions



CRM, Lead Tracking & Reporting



Maintain CRM systems or lead tracking tools to track inquiries, leads, and campaign outcomes



Track where leads are coming from and which efforts are producing results



Provide weekly and monthly reporting on social growth, website traffic, SEO performance,
 performance, lead generation, and campaign results



Conduct performance benchmark assessments



Translate performance data into actionable recommendations and next steps

 marketing platforms

title: Millwork Estimator- Cebu
description:
This position is based in Cebu office. NO REMOTE WORK OFFERED. 



Complete Construction is a NZ locally owned company specialising in cabinetry and joinery manufacturing and interior renovations for hospitality, health care, retail, high end residential and commercial buildings.  Regardless of the scale, we take pride in every project we complete. Founded in 2003, today our team is made up of highly-skilled and specialist people who are all experts in their chosen field, down to earth, and great team players. It is our people and their talent that ensures the exceptional work we deliver for our clients.



We are seeking a detail-oriented and commercially minded Millwork Estimator to join our team. This role is responsible for preparing accurate cost estimates for custom cabinetry, joinery, and interior fit-out projects across commercial and residential sectors.



You will ensure all estimates are competitive, precise, and aligned with project requirements.



Key Responsibilities

• Review architectural drawings, specifications, and tender documents

• Prepare detailed cost estimates for millwork and cabinetry projects

• Perform material take-offs (e.g., MDF, plywood, hardware, finishes)

• Assess labour, machining, finishing, and installation costs

• Liaise with suppliers to obtain pricing for materials and hardware

• Identify risks, gaps, or inconsistencies in project documentation

• Collaborate with designers and production teams to ensure buildability

• Prepare and submit tender documentation within deadlines

• Track estimate accuracy and provide feedback for continuous improvement

• Support value engineering initiatives to optimise cost and efficiency



Skills & Experience

• Proven experience as a Millwork Estimator, Joinery Estimator, or similar role

• Strong understanding of cabinetry, joinery, and manufacturing processes

• Ability to read and interpret architectural and shop drawings

• Experience with material take-offs and cost planning

• Knowledge of CNC processes and production workflows (advantageous)

• Proficiency in estimating software and/or Excel

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Strong organisational and time management skills

• Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines

• Prior experience using Procore advantageous but not essential.
