title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!!!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Static Image Editor (E-commerce Ads & Creative)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled static image editor to create high-converting visuals for e-commerce marketing. Your work will be used across paid ads, landing pages, and
 campaigns, so performance matters just as much as design. This role is focused on direct response creative, not just aesthetic design.



In this role, you will be responsible for creating ad creatives such as before-and-after images, problem-solution visuals, UGC-style edits, and promotional graphics. You will edit and enhance product images, design scroll-stopping hooks, and incorporate strong text overlays that highlight key benefits and offers. You will also be expected to produce multiple variations of creatives for testing and continuously improve designs based on performance metrics like click-through rate and cost per acquisition.



The ideal candidate has experience in e-commerce or direct response design and understands what makes an ad convert. You should be comfortable using tools like Photoshop or Canva and be able to follow creative direction while also bringing your own ideas to the table. Speed and efficiency are important, as this role involves producing creatives consistently. Experience working with fashion or female-focused brands is a plus, but not required.



Compensation will be structured either per image or as a monthly retainer depending on your experience and output, with opportunities for performance-based bonuses tied to winning creatives.



To apply, please include a portfolio focused specifically on ad creatives rather than general design work, along with examples of high-converting images if available. Also include your typical turnaround time for a small batch of images and your preferred rate. This is a long-term opportunity for someone who understands that performance and results matter more than just making designs look good. If you have read this far, say apple at the bottom of application.



-make sure to include resume with example statics you have created in the past

title: AI-First Creative Strategist & Video Editor
description:
About NOURI AI

We're building an AI-powered app that scans supplements and tells you if they're legit or trash. Think of it as a Shazam for supplements. We're pre-launch, moving fast, and need someone who can create scroll-stopping content that converts.



The Role

We're looking for an AI-native Creative Strategist / Video Editor. The key differentiator: you should be using AI for 70%+ of the production pipeline — generating footage, creating avatars, automating edits. We want someone who ships fast because they've mastered the AI toolkit, not someone who manually edits frame by frame.



What You'll Do



• Create 10 short-form video ads per week for TikTok & Meta (Reels, Stories, Feed)

• Use AI as your primary production tool:

  • Video generation: Sora, Kling, Nano Banana for b-roll and scenes

  • AI avatars/presenters: Higgsfield for talking head content

  • Voice cloning/TTS: ElevenLabs for voiceovers

  • AI editing: CapCut auto-captions, AI templates, auto-cuts

• Develop creative concepts and hooks based on trending formats

• Scrape and source b-roll from the internet when AI generation isn't ideal

• Create multiple variations of each ad (different hooks, CTAs, lengths)

• Track what performs and double down on winners

• Stay on top of new AI tools — you should be testing new tools weekly



Requirements



• Experience creating short-form video content for paid social (Meta & TikTok)

• Heavy AI tool user — show us your AI workflow, not just your timeline

• Portfolio showing direct response / performance marketing video ads

• Strong understanding of hooks, retention, and what makes people stop scrolling

• Proficiency in CapCut (required)

• Already using at least 3+ AI video/audio tools regularly

• Can work in US Eastern timezone overlap (at least 4-5 hours)

• Self-starter — takes a brief and delivers without hand-holding

• Fluent English (written — for captions, hooks, CTAs)



Nice to Have



• Experience in health/wellness/supplement niche

• Understanding of Meta/TikTok Ads Manager (reading performance metrics)

• Experience building creative testing frameworks (hook matrices, angle testing)



Deliverables



• 10 edited video ads per week (mixed formats: 15s, 30s, 60s)

• 3-5 new hook/angle concepts per week

• Weekly creative report (what worked, what to test next)

• Organized asset library



How to Apply

Send us:



1. 3-5 examples of ads you made (bonus if AI-generated content is visible)

2. List of AI tools you use daily and how you use them

3. A 60-second Loom showing your AI-powered editing workflow

4. Your availability and monthly rate

title: Recruiting Admin VA — Driver Pipeline Management (US-Based Client)
description:
We are a small delivery business based in Atlanta, Georgia. We need a detail-oriented VA to manage our driver recruiting pipeline from start to finish. This is a process-driven role — you will follow a clear checklist and SOP. No guesswork required.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Monitor Indeed for incoming driver applications and pull all applicants

Screen each applicant against a provided hard criteria checklist (pass/fail, no judgment calls)

Message passing candidates through Indeed within 24 hours using provided scripts

Confirm availability, shift fit, and reason for leaving prior delivery role

Load approved candidates into our background check system (FADV) as a 3rd party

Follow up daily with candidates on outstanding background check items

Send owner a twice-weekly pipeline summary (template provided)

Flag approved candidates to owner immediately with a one-message summary



REQUIREMENTS

Excellent written English — you will be communicating directly with US-based candidates

Prior experience in recruiting admin, HR coordination, or applicant tracking preferred

Highly organized and process-driven — this role requires precision, not creativity

Available for at least 4 hours overlap with US Eastern Time (9am–1pm ET preferred)

Able to respond to owner messages within 2 hours during business hours



COMPENSATION & TERMS

30-day paid trial period before long-term commitment

Long-term role for the right candidate — we do not churn VAs



To apply: Send a brief message explaining your experience with recruiting or applicant tracking, and confirm your English proficiency and ET time zone overlap. Applications without this information will not be reviewed.

title: Email Marketing Specialist (Klaviyo / Omnisend Expert) – Setup & Monthly Retainer
description:
We are a rapidly growing custom event display and apparel company looking for an
 Marketing Specialist to partner with us for the long term.



Klaviyo Experts Welcome: We use Omnisend, but if you are an expert in Klaviyo, we will pay you to adapt to our platform.



Why this job is perfect for you: This role is designed to be front-loaded. We need heavy help getting set up now, followed by a lighter, consistent weekly schedule. This is perfect if you have other clients and are looking for a stable, long-term "anchor" client to add to your roster.



Phase 1: The Setup (Heavy Workload - First 2-4 Weeks)

In the first month, we will need you to work more hours to audit and build our core infrastructure.



Audit & Strategy: Review our current list and segments.



Flow Construction: Build out robust Abandoned Cart, Browse Abandonment, Post-Purchase, and Welcome Series flows.



Template Design: Create reusable templates for our newsletters.



Phase 2: The Maintenance (Consistent - 4-6 Hours/Week)

Once the flows are live, your role will shift to a consistent weekly rhythm of optimization and campaigning.



Campaigns: Build and schedule 2-3 weekly
 blasts (we provide the offers/direction).



Optimization: Monitor flow performance and A/B test subject lines.



Reporting: A quick weekly check-in on stats.



The Role

Strategy & Logic: We provide the offers; you ensure the implementation, segmentation, and logic are flawless.



Design: You should be comfortable using the drag-and-drop builder to make
s look professional.



Platform: Deep experience with Klaviyo OR Omnisend triggers and segments is required.



Job Details

Pay: $7.00 per hour.



Status: Part-Time / Long-Term Retainer.



Location: Remote.



How to Apply

To apply, please send:



Portfolio: Screenshots or links to
s/flows you have built.



Phase 1 vs Phase 2: Please confirm you are okay with a heavier workload in Month 1 followed by ~5 hours/week moving forward.



Video Intro (Optional): A short video or audio recording introducing yourself is preferred if possible.

title: Shopify Developer - Design & Administration
description:
Shopify Developer & E-Commerce Manager

Full-Time | Fashion Jewelry Brand

About Us

We are a modern luxury fashion jewelry brand dedicated to craftsmanship, conscious design, and elevated customer experience. As we continue to scale globally, we are seeking an experienced Shopify Developer & E-Commerce Manager to lead our digital storefront, optimise performance, and bring strong technical and creative capability to our growing team.



Role Overview

The Shopify Developer & E-Commerce Manager is responsible for the end-to-end management, development, optimisation, and performance of our Shopify-based e-commerce platform. This role blends technical expertise with strategic e-commerce leadership to deliver a seamless, high-converting online experience aligned with our brand aesthetic and business objectives.

You will work across development, UX, CRO, site merchandising, integrations, automation, analytics, and operations, ensuring our Shopify ecosystem runs flawlessly while continually evolving to meet customer needs and growth targets.



Key Responsibilities

Shopify Development & Technical Ownership

Develop, maintain, and optimise the Shopify storefront, including custom themes, templates, scripts, and Liquid code.

Build and implement new features, landing pages, and custom functionalities aligned with brand direction.

Manage API integrations for apps, ERP, CRM, fulfilment systems, inventory tools, and marketing platforms.



Qualifications & Experience

Required

Minimum 5 years of professional experience in Shopify development and e-commerce management.

Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.

Expert in Shopify, Liquid, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JSON, and modern front-end best practices.

Strong understanding of Shopify Plus (preferred) or advanced Shopify features.

Experience integrating and optimising third-party apps, APIs, and automation tools.

Proven ability to lead CRO, UX improvements, and site optimisation strategies.

Demonstrated experience managing end-to-end e-commerce operations.

Strong analytical mindset and proficiency with GA4, Shopify Analytics, and data tools.

Ability to manage technical and non-technical projects simultaneously.





Preferred

Experience in fashion, luxury, or jewelry e-commerce.

Familiarity with SEO, schema, and performance marketing integrations.

Knowledge of Klaviyo, Gorgias, Yotpo, or similar platforms.

Understanding of global e-commerce operations, multi-market setups, and duties/tax complexities.







Skills & Competencies

High technical proficiency with a creative, aesthetic-driven approach.

Strong problem solving and troubleshooting abilities.

Excellent communication and project management skills.

Ability to work autonomously and within a collaborative brand environment.

Detail-oriented, organised, and proactive.

Passion for luxury, fashion, craftsmanship, and digital innovation.







What We Offer

Opportunity to join a high-growth fashion jewelry brand with global presence.

Local timezone healthy hours.

Collaborative, creative environment where innovation and craftsmanship matter. Access to Ad Agency & internal gun team with professional marketplace savvy.

Competitive salary based on experience. Local timezone healthy hours. 

Flexibility, autonomy, and room to shape and elevate our digital ecosystem.

Paid holiday for the suitable experienced candidate.

Founder led and hands on with development capabilities.

title: Video Editor: E-Commerce Videos ($40 per video)
description:
About Us:

AdChefs works with e-commerce brands to build their in-house video editing teams. You get placed with one brand, work as part of their team, and get daily support from a lead who gives feedback and coaches you.



What We Are Looking For:

A full-time video editor for short-for
ta ads. You'll turn raw footage into 30-60 second creatives that stop the scroll and drive purchases.



Benefits of Joining Us:

- Stable, long-term relationship in a real e-commerce brand, without the instability of freelancing.

- $40 per video. Most editors complete 6 - 8 videos/week, averaging $1,000-$1,500/month

- Daily feedback from a dedicated lead who's invested in your growth

- Access to real performance data so you see what your edits actually do

- The possibility to grow into a senior role, earning $1,500 - $2,000 per month



Qualifications:

- 3+ years in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects

- Portfolio with e-commerce or direct-response ad work (Meta preferred)

- Strong feel for hooks and pacing, you know what stops the scroll in the first 2 seconds

- Coachable and consistent, you take feedback and actually apply it



Responsibilities:

Edit high-converting short-form ads using provided A-roll, B-roll, and creative direction. Direct the pacing, music, transitions, hooks, and overall feel of every video.



You Should Not Apply If:

- You're looking for a side gig or already have a full-time commitment

- You don’t have experience editing ads for eCommerce brands

- You treat feedback as criticism instead of fuel



You Should Apply If:

- You want real in-house experience without giving up the flexibility of remote work

- You care more about whether the ad converts than whether it looks pretty

Next Steps:

Excellent English



Strong objection-handling skills



Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls



Reliable high-speed internet and quiet work environment



Headset and backup power/internet preferred



What We’re Looking For:



Highly motivated and results-driven



Organized and detail-oriented



Coachable and open to feedback



Positive attitude and strong work ethic



Long-term mindset



Compensation:

Opportunity for growth and long-term position



If you have strong Follow Up Boss experience and a proven track record as a Real Estate ISA, we want to hear from you!

 with "Closer" in the subject line

title: Social Media Content Creator & Manager – Health & Wellness Brand (ZenCove)
description:
ZenCove is a new U.S.-based health and wellness brand focused on cold plunges, saunas, and recovery equipment. We're looking for a talented and self-motivated Social Media Content Creator & Manager to own our presence across Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube Shorts.

This is a remote, part-time role with strong potential to grow into full-time as the brand scales.

What You'll Do:



Design eye-catching graphics and edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) that fits the ZenCove brand aesthetic — clean, premium, wellness-focused

Write compelling captions and research relevant hashtags for every post

Build and manage a content calendar; schedule and publish posts consistently

Monitor comments and DMs across all platforms and engage with our community in a friendly, on-brand voice

Stay current on wellness and biohacking trends to keep content fresh and relevant



You're a Great Fit If You:



Have 1–2+ years of social media content experience, ideally for a product or e-commerce brand

Are proficient in Canva, CapCut, Adobe Express, or similar tools

Can write clean, engaging English copy (U.S. audience)

Are organized, proactive, and can work independently without constant supervision

Have a genuine interest in health, wellness, fitness, or biohacking



Bonus Points:



Experience with cold plunge, sauna, or fitness brands

Familiarity with scheduling tools like Later, Buffer, or Meta Business Suite

Basic video filming/editing skills (even smartphone-level)

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant: FBA, Private Label Specialist
description:
Position: Amazon FBA Virtual Assistant

Our Business Model: Private Label (not Wholesale, Online Arbitrage)

Full-time. 40 hours each week. Please do not apply if you are holding other jobs.

Remote (Work-from-home)



REQUIREMENTS:

-FEMALE applicants only

-Must have proven work experience as an Amazon VA

-Must have a reliable, fully functional computer suitable for daily work

-Must have a stable internet connection with a minimum speed of 20 Mbps

-Strong communication skills, with proficiency in written and spoken English

-Strong research and analytical skills, with the ability to interpret data and make data-driven improvements

-Detail-oriented and highly organized, with a high level of accuracy

-Strong time management skills, with the ability to consistently meet deadlines

-Proactive, resourceful, and able to work independently while collaborating with a team

-Willing to learn, adapt, and take on new responsibilities over time



RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Manage daily Amazon Seller Central operations, including customer service, case management, account health monitoring, and resolving account or listing issues

-Perform keyword and competitor research to create and optimize high-converting Amazon listings (titles, bullet points, backend search terms) using tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or DataDive

-Create and improve Amazon listing images and Premium A+ Content using Photoshop, Canva, and AI creative tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Google AI Studio

-Create and edit high-quality product videos using Filmora, CapCut, Premiere Pro, and AI video tools such as Sora and Flow Veo

-Monitor and manage inventory levels, shipments, and stock replenishment to avoid stockouts or overstock

-Experience with Amazon PPC (campaign setup and optimization) is a strong plus



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

1. Asia working hours

2. Work-from-home setup

3. National holidays off, paid

4. Bonus: 13th Month

5. Bonus: Year end

6. Long-term opportunity with career growth

7. Supportive and collaborative team



HOW TO APPLY:

If you are interested in this position and believe you have the qualities listed above to be successful, please submit your applications with the following in the correct order:

1. CV with your education and work experience in chronological order.

2. Attach your work portfolio: relevant work samples

Join our team and grow with us!

title: Creative Director
description:
Please copy the URL link for the detailed resume:







Creative Director, Brand & Visual Identity — 7 Leaves Cafe



We are not looking for someone to execute a brief. We are looking for someone who writes the brief.



7 Leaves Cafe is a 40+ location beverage brand built on exceptional quality, cultural depth, and a customer experience that is genuinely distinct. We have grown through product and community. Now we are ready to grow through design, and we need a creative leader who can own that chapter entirely.



The Role

This role exists to establish, protect, and elevate the visual identity of 7 Leaves across every surface — physical, digital, and experiential. You will be the first person who truly owns this function. You will report directly into leadership with full authority to champion design as a strategic asset. We are open to full-time, fractional, or a project engagement that transitions into a longer-term partnership.



What You Will Own



- Brand architecture — identity system, typography, color, photography, tone

- Retail and in-store experience — signage, packaging, physical touchpoints

- Digital and campaign design — social, marketing, launches

- Creative direction of external collaborators

- Brand governance — you set and hold the standard



Who You Are



- 8+ years in brand design, art direction, or creative leadership

- Portfolio that shows systems thinking, not just beautiful one-offs

- Experience building consumer brands in food, beverage, hospitality, or retail

- You have a point of view, can defend it, and know when to update it

- You are energized by ownership, not intimidated by it



What We Are Not Looking For

This is not a production role. Not a generalist freelancer. Not a trend-follower. We need creative vision, brand depth, and genuine conviction.



How to Apply

Skip the cover letter template. Send us:



1. Your portfolio (required — no exceptions)

2. 3–5 sentences on what you believe is visually underdeveloped about 7 Leaves today, based on what you've observed publicly

3. One project from your portfolio that proves you can do this job — and why

4. Your preferred engagement model and rate



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed. The brand note is not optional.

title: Video Editor (Short-Form Reels / CapCut) – Ongoing Work
description:
We’re hiring a high-level, fast video editor for ongoing short-form content (Reels/TikTok).



This is not a creative-heavy role — it’s about precision, speed, and consistency at scale.



You’ll be editing street interview content from live events, following a proven format:

 



----



ROLE

 • Cut footage into tight, engaging short-form edits

 • Add clean, accurate subtitles (must be perfect)

 • Apply consistent branding (logos, fonts provided)

 • Match existing style exactly — no guesswork



----



NON-NEGOTIABLES

 • Deliver within 12 hours of receiving footage (Work is scheduled in advanced so you'll know ahead of time)

 • Be highly responsive (we work fast)

 • Follow references exactly

 • Strong English — subtitles must be clean and natural



If you miss deadlines or need multiple revisions, this role is not for you.



----



TOOLS

 • CapCut preferred (or equivalent with same efficiency)



----



WHAT YOU GET

 • Ongoing, consistent work

 • Simple, repeatable editing system

 • Opportunity to grow into more advanced projects



----



TO APPLY (STRICT)



Only apply if you meet the above.



Send:

 1. 3–5 of your best short-form edits (Reels/TikTok)

 2. Your exact turnaround time for a 30–60 sec video

 3. Your rate (per video or hourly)



Start your application with: “12 HOUR EDITOR”



----



FINAL NOTE



We’re looking for someone who can:

 • Execute fast

 • Deliver clean work first time

 • Handle volume without drop in quality



If you’re average, you won’t last.

If you’re sharp, this will turn into ongoing work immediately.

title: Website Migration Specialist – GoHighLevel (Project-Based)
description:
We're a New Zealand digital agency looking for an experienced GoHighLevel website builder to migrate existing websites into GoHighLevel — rebuilding them like-for-like inside the GHL page builder.

We have an immediate batch of 9 websites to migrate (ranging from 1 to 9 pages), with ongoing project work available for the right person.

What the work involves

You'll be given access to an existing live website and asked to recreate it inside GoHighLevel as accurately as possible — matching layout, content, colours, fonts, and functionality. Each site is a standalone project with its own quote and timeline.

What we're looking for



Proven experience building websites inside GoHighLevel (not just funnels)

Strong eye for detail — pixel-accurate recreation matters

Able to match typography, spacing, colour schemes, and section layouts

Experience connecting custom domains in GHL

Able to work independently from a brief with minimal hand-holding

Fast turnaround — these are simple local business websites, not complex builds

Bonus: experience customising the GoHighLevel blog using custom CSS or code



What we're NOT looking for



People who will use templates that don't match the original

People who need a lot of back-and-forth to understand the brief

Designers who will "improve" the site rather than replicate it



How it works



Each project is quoted individually based on page count and complexity

You'll review the existing site and provide a fixed price quote before work begins

Payment on completion and approval

First batch of 9 sites available immediately — ongoing work for the right person



To apply, please include:



Examples of websites you have built inside GoHighLevel (live URLs preferred)

Your typical project rate for a simple local business website (quote per page count is fine)

A brief description of your migration process — how do you approach replicating an existing site?

If applicable, examples of GHL blog customisation using CSS or code

title: Customer Support Representative
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, quick-thinking Customer Support Representative. At our company, support goes beyond answering questions. It’s about guiding customers seamlessly through their gaming experience and ensuring every interaction is fast, clear, and dependable.



We’re seeking someone who takes pride in delivering exceptional service, thrives in a high-paced environment, and enjoys solving problems in real time. If you’re proactive, detail-oriented, and genuinely driven to help customers succeed, you could be a great fit for our team.



Key Responsibilities

1. Manage Intercom Live Chat, responding promptly to live chat,
, and occasional social media inquiries.

2. Troubleshoot unique scenarios and edge cases using logic, judgment, and customer-first thinking — not scripts.

3. Proactively update customers on order status by coordinating with our internal team and third-party suppliers.

4. Communicate clearly, professionally, and naturally, no robotic replies or over-reliance on AI.

5. Identify opportunities to streamline the support experience and improve internal systems and workflows.

6. Collaborate closely with tea
mbers and suppliers to ensure smooth delivery from start to finish.

7. Handle multiple tasks with urgency, accuracy, and strong attention to detail in a high-volume environment.



Ideal Candidate:

- Passionate about helping others: You have a natural desire to solve problems and help customers succeed in their goals.

- Excellent communicator: Your communication skills are top-notch, whether it’s written, via
 or live chat.

- Adaptable: You thrive in a fast-paced environment and are quick to learn new systems and technologies.

- Detail oriented: You pay attention and notice issues before customers even point them out.



Required Experience

- Experience with Intercom (highly preferred) or similar customer support platforms such as Zendesk or Freshdesk

- Previous customer support experience (live chat)

- Reliable high-speed internet

- Ability to work remotely with minimal distractions

- Load-shedding readiness (backup power, mobile hotspot, or contingency plan in place)



Training will be provided for Intercom if you haven’t used it before.



Why Work With Us?

- Be part of something bigger: Join a team that’s on a mission to revolutionize the video gaming space, with practical, results-driven strategies and a global community of passionate players and creators.

- Dynamic team: Work with a passionate and growing team that is committed to excellence and innovation.

- Consistent workflow: Enjoy a structured work environment with clear expectations, steady tasks, and room to grow.

- Growth and learning: Professionally develop and grow skills with ongoing learning and advancements of responsibilities within the company.



YOU SHOULDN’T APPLY IF:

- You’re comfortable blending in rather than striving to stand out. This role is NOT simple and requires an all-in mentality. We’re looking for an applicant who will put in the work that others won’t

- You are married to your ideas or cannot take creative criticism.

- You can’t handle stress or pressure.



Think you’re a fit? Apply Today. Include the word ‘CACTUS’ in your message to us to show you’ve read the full post.

title: Xero Bookkeeper Australian Experience
description:
BeanGuru are bookkeepers for Busy Business owners. We love to help business owners manage their books to they can get back to their “Why they run their business”.



Would you like to help business owners get more time back? Do you like knowing you’ve made their job easier by using your amazing bookkeeping skills to do what they don’t have time to do? Are you detail oriented, positive, eager to learn and humble enough to ask questions?



If yes we’d like to invite you to become a valued member of our small but fast growing team.



We service small to medium businesses across Australia for their bookkeeping needs. We are a professionally run, highly systemised, Xero focused business that values our clients and our tea
mbers like family. And we love attention to detail.



Note you are working as a full time direct tea
mber with Bean Guru employed by us through our Philippines representative and not via an agency or offshoring middle person.





We are looking for a Bookkeeper who has worked with Australian Bookkeeping and GST as well as done client communication.



On your first day with us you’ll have at least 3+ years experience working with Australian bookkeeping operations including GST, IAS and BAS.



You’ll also already have extensive experience in XERO as well as the core aspects of bookkeeping:

- AR/AP - invoicing, statements, reconciliation, batch payments etc

- Bank and Ledger Reconciliations

- Data entry and transaction processing

- Basic reporting



Experience in payroll and superannuation would be highly regarded:



It also important that you have excellent spoken and written English, are a clear communicator, eager to learn/grow your skills and open to seeking help when needed.



As a finance professional you will have a comfortable and productive work environment, excellent internet access that supports video calling.



We look forward to meeting you. If you put the number 42 in your application to us we'll know you have attention to detail.



Benefits and Pay:

- Immediate start available

- Salary based on experience + many benefits including:

- 13-month pay

- All Paid PH Public Holidays

- Daytime (AU East Coast) work hours with some flexibility on start time

- Full-time EMPLOYMENT

- WORK FROM HOME



***Applicants must be LEGAL to work and currently residing in the Philippines***



Our hiring process will be a little bit different we want to hire great people with the right mindset and fit for our great company culture.



1. Reply to this ad with your resume and a covering letter telling us why you'd like to work with us and reason for change.

2. We will contact the short list and have a first interview.

3. We will do a skills test which will take roughly 60-90mins

4. Final interview with our founder Judith.

5. A call to say you made it welcome aboard.

title: Web Designer / WooCommerce Developer for 4 Simple E-Commerce Sites
description:
We are looking for a skilled and dependable web designer / web developer to help build and improve our website, 
, and possibly 3 other simple e-commerce sites for our company.



We prefer someone with strong English skills, good communication, a great attitude, and real experience building attractive, clean, user-friendly online stores. We have worked with Shopify, but it did not work well for us. At this time, we prefer WooCommerce, though we are open to hearing other recommendations if you strongly feel another platform would be better for SEO, ease of use, and long-term success.



We want someone who understands not only design, but also SEO, product organization, and how to build stores that are easy for customers to shop. We are especially interested in someone who may also be able to help import or transfer listings from Amazon and Etsy into our new websites efficiently.



We are open to candidates who use AI tools to help with workflow, productivity, SEO, content, or design. If needed, we may help provide access to AI tools for the right person.



What we are looking for:



Strong English communication

Experience building e-commerce websites

Strong WooCommerce experience preferred

Good eye for clean design and layout

Knowledge of SEO best practices

Ability to import or recreate product listings from Amazon and Etsy

Dependable, honest, and detail-oriented

Good pricing for long-term work



About the role:



Help improve and build 

Possibly build or assist with 3 additional simple e-commerce sites

Make sure the sites are clean, functional, and SEO-friendly

Help organize products and content

Possibly assist with product imports and setup

Long-term opportunity for the right person



To apply, please answer these questions clearly:



1. Would you accept PayPal payments or Wise?

2. What would your estimated cost be for helping with 4 simple e-commerce sites?

3. When could you start?

4. Please send a working link to your portfolio

5. Do you have any questions for us?



Please also tell us about any other useful skills you have, especially with:



WooCommerce

SEO

Amazon / Etsy product importing

AI tools

Graphic design

Website maintenance

Speed optimization



We are looking for someone with a good attitude who may be a strong long-term fit for our company.

Thank you and look forward to hearing from you soon.

title: EXPERIENCED Product Lister, Optimizer & Product Researcher | Fashion Dropshipping
description:
Hi Future teammember,



We are looking for the most HUNGRY Product Lister & Optimizer for our fashion dropshipping business:



At this 
nt our company is launching
products per week. All those products need to be listed on time. 

Besides that we have new winning products every single day that need to be optimized by adjusting the price, size chart, images, description, title, etc. This is a full-time job and we are going to scale the amount of products in the next few months. 

Does this sound like it's your piece of cake? Read further.



The future of the job:

We will also teach you how to do product research and find these
products per week. You are going to analyse our current winners and losers. Eventually when we scale up our weekly products we will need more listers and you will work in a team of listers. 



**DON'T RESPOND if you have 0 experience and you JUST want to do product listing.



------



Is this you?:

- Minimum 1 year experience in product listing for fashion dropshipping 

- Minimum 1 year experience in product optimizing for fashion dropshipping 

- You are HUNGRY to grow (our best employees worked with us for 1.5+ year and grew into managing positions)

- You work extremely detailed (eye for detail)

- You work extremely organized and structured (you can make and organize your own sheets)

- You work fast and want to do more than necessary 



------



Salary: we will start with $3 per hour. We always work with KPI's, meaning you will make X amount of listings in Y amount of time. There is always work to do in our business so you can work minimum 40 hours per week. Sundays are off. We always reward based of your commitment (hitting KPI's, doing more work, learning).

title: Creative Designer
description:
Fusion Vine is a remote-first company focused on building scalable systems by combining skilled talent with AI-powered workflows. We support businesses through content, creative, and digital execution while prioritizing efficiency, clarity, and quality.



Our team is distributed globally and operates with clear SOPs, structured feedback, and performance-based growth. We value execution, accountability, and continuous improvement.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Creative Specialist to support our visual content needs and reduce reliance on subcontractors. This role focuses on producing high-quality, on-brand visual assets using a mix of design tools and AI-assisted platforms.

This is a priority role aimed at bringing creative work in-house while maintaining speed, consistency, and quality.



Key Goal

Reduce dependency on external subcontractors by producing consistent, high-quality visual assets internally.



Responsibilities

Create visual content using Canva Pro, Photoshop, and AI tools

Produce graphics for digital use (social media, marketing, content assets, etc.)

Use AI tools (e.g., InVideo or similar) to assist with creative production

Follow brand guidelines, templates, and creative briefs

Edit, resize, and optimize images for different platforms

Manage workload efficiently and meet deadlines

Apply feedback quickly and accurately



Skills & Requirements

Proven experience with Canva Pro (required)

Working knowledge of Photoshop

Experience or familiarity with AI creative tools (e.g., InVideo, nano banana, midjourney, kling.ai)

Strong attention to detail and visual consistency

Ability to follow creative instructions and SOPs

Reliable internet connection and suitable device for design work



Workload Expectations

Approx.
images per month for full time work

Volume may vary depending on project needs and performance



If you’ve read this far, please include “TACOS” in the subject line when applying for this role.



Compensation

Hourly, based on experience and skill level

Final rate discussed during the hiring process





Apply here:

title: If You Only Edit Short-Form… Don’t Apply (Long-Form Editor Needed)
description:
Most video editors can’t do this.



And that’s not an insult…



It’s just reality.





If your entire skillset is:



- Adding captions

- Zoom cuts every 2 seconds

- Throwing random B-roll on top of talking heads

- Matching words to text like karaoke



This is NOT for you.



Seriously… don’t apply.





Because what we’re building requires a completely different brain.





What we actually need (read this twice):



In short someone who can edit like this:







We’re looking for a long-form video editor who can:



Zoom OUT before they zoom in



Understand the point of a video before touching the timeline



Edit with intention… not decoration



Tie every cut, visual, and pacing decision back to a bigger narrative



This is NOT about making things “more engaging” with noise.



This is about making things more compelling with structure.





Here’s the problem we keep running into…



Editors who come from short-form think:



“More visuals = better edit”



So what happens?



- Every sentence gets a caption

- Every 3 seconds gets a cut

- Every idea gets drowned in unnecessary B-roll



And the final product?



Feels busy… but empty.



Looks edited… but not thought through.



We don’t want that.





What great looks like to us:



You watch a 20-minute video…



And you’re not thinking about transitions or effects…



You’re locked into the story.



Everything feels intentional.



Every cut earns its place.



The pacing breathes.



And when it ends…



You remember the message.





This role is for you if:



You’ve edited long-form content (10+ minutes) like:



- YouTube videos

- Podcast videos



And more importantly…



You think in:



- Narrative arcs

- Retention flow

- Emotional pacing

- Information hierarchy



Not just:



- Effects

- Presets

- Templates





Damaging truth:



This kind of editing is slower.



It takes more thinking.



More rewatching.



More restraint.



BUT…



The end result is 10x more powerful…



And that’s what we care about.





What you’ll be responsible for:



Taking raw long-form footage and shaping it into a cohesive, compelling story



Making editing decisions based on the goal of the video… not habits



Enhancing clarity, flow, and retention without over-editing



Knowing when to add… and when to leave things alone





What we don’t care about:



- Fancy transitions

- Overused editing tricks

- How fast you can pump out clips





What we DO care about:



- Taste



- Judgment



- Restraint



- Storytelling ability



PS. You should be able to handle basic color grading inside DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut.



Nothing crazy…



But enough to make footage feel clean, consistent, and intentional.





How to apply (this is important):



Do NOT send us short-form edits.



We will ignore them.



Instead, send:



2–3 long-form projects (10+ minutes) you’ve edited



And tell us:



- What was the goal of the video?

- What editing decisions did you make to support that goal?

- What did you intentionally choose NOT to do… and why?





If you read this and thought:



“Finally… someone gets it.”



We want to see your work.





If you read this and thought:



“This seems like overthinking editing…”



This is not for you.





If this feels obvious to you…



You’re probably who we’re looking for.



Send your portfolio.

7pm-3am, 3 am-11am, 11 am-7 pm

Organization skills

Patience

Good listener

After Training you’ll have a one month period where we review your performance with our leadership team to d
 whether we will bring you on as an official member of the team.



Official members of the team are granted bonuses for performance (tied to account growth and engagement metrics), the opportunity for extra hours, vacation pay, and more.



After 3 months of good performance, we will discuss opportunities for promotion into leadership positions. Pay increase will continue as long as targets are achieved.



The more you put into this job the more you will be rewarded.

 regularly.

title: Virtual Assistant for Events & Digital Brands
description:
Per hour rate:
per hour (Hours depending on project needs) Roughly 20 hours per week



We’re building some of the most recognised brands in the short term rental and accommodation space across Australia and New Zealand. That means conferences, podcasts, digital platforms, websites, content, and a lot of moving parts.



Right now, we’re looking for a self employed contractor who wants more than a standard VA gig. This is a hands on, fast paced support role sitting at the heart of three growing brands:



* STRIVE Conference

Industry leading events and awards bringing together property managers, owners, and suppliers across Australia, New Zealand, and beyond.



* The Accommodation Show

A long running podcast featuring operators, founders, and leaders in hospitality, travel, and short term rentals.



* iBooked.online

A digital agency focused on direct bookings, websites, SEO, and marketing strategy for accommodation businesses.



If you enjoy variety, problem solving, and being close to the action, you’ll feel right at home.



What You’ll Actually Be Doing



This role is deliberately broad. You’ll touch a lot of areas, without being expected to be an expert in all of them from day one.



Admin and operations

* Managing inboxes and basic diary coordination

* Organising data, lists, and spreadsheets

* Supporting day to day business admin across the brands



Content and marketing support

* Scheduling social media posts across multiple platforms

* Assisting with podcast uploads, episode assets, and show notes

* Helping prepare
 campaigns and announcements

* Light content editing and formatting



Web and tech support

* Simple WordPress edits and page updates

* Uploading content, images, and basic changes

* Working with tools like Google Workspace, social schedulers, and
 platforms



Events support

* Helping coordinate speakers, sponsors, and partners

* Keeping track of assets, deadlines, and comms

* Supporting event logistics before, during, and after delivery



You won’t just be following instructions. You’ll be encouraged to spot gaps, suggest improvements, and contribute ideas for content, campaigns, and processes.



Hours, Flexibility & Setup



* Around 20 to 60 hours per week

* Spread across 5 to 6 days

* Fully remote and flexible

* Work to your own rhythm, as long as things get done



This suits freelancers who like consistent work without being locked into rigid hours.



Who This Is Great For



This role is ideal if you:



* Are a freelancer or contractor looking for a long term client

* Enjoy variety rather than doing the same task all day

* Like hospitality, travel, marketing, media, or tech

* Want exposure to events and the short term rental industry

* Are organised, detail oriented, and proactive



You’ll be working with people and brands across Australia and New Zealand, and you’ll build genuine industry connections along the way.



Skills We’re Looking For



* Strong written English

* Confidence with Google Workspace

* Comfortable with social media tools

* Basic WordPress experience

* Good internet connection and a solid home setup

* Curious mindset and willingness to learn



You don’t need to know everything upfront. You do need to be reliable, switched on, and comfortable juggling priorities.



Growth & Pay



As your role expands and your impact grows, your rates will grow too. This is a relationship we want to invest in, not a short term stop gap.



How to Apply



Send us:



* A short intro about you

* A link to something you’ve worked on that you’re proud of

* Your hourly or project based rate



If you like being close to the action and want to grow alongside brands that are genuinely building something in this space, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Senior Amazon Marketplace Operator — Full Account Management, Brand Authority & Walmart
description:
MontBlack Inc. is a U.S.-based digital distribution company. We partner with legacy and family-owned consumer brands and manage their full marketplace presence on Amazon and Walmart. We currently operate 6+ active brand accounts and are bringing our marketplace operations fully in-house.

We are looking for someone who has operated inside an Amazon agency or multi-brand environment — someone who has seen and solved every type of Amazon problem across multiple accounts simultaneously.

You are not here to learn marketplace basics. You are here to install a system that scales.

Your responsibility is to build and maintain the marketplace operating system that allows MontBlack to grow multiple brands simultaneously. Walmart follows Amazon’s core logic — if you own Amazon PPC end-to-end, you will own Walmart within 30 days.



What You Will Own

PPC & Advertising

? Build and manage Amazon SP, SB, and SD campaigns across all brand accounts

? Build and manage Walmart Sponsored Ads inside Seller Center — candidates with strong Amazon PPC fundamentals will adapt quickly as Walmart’s ad structure follows similar logic

? Create SOPs for campaign structure, keyword strategy, bid management, and launch sequencing

? Build standardized product launch frameworks (discovery ? ranking ? scaling)

? Weekly search term audits, negative keyword management, and budget pacing

? Monitor and optimize ACoS, TACoS, CTR, CVR across the full portfolio

? Diagnose conversion issues impacting ad performance and align PPC with listing quality

? Build standardized reporting across all brands

? Actively use AI tools for keyword research, campaign analysis, and workflow efficiency — this is a requirement, not a bonus



Catalog & Listing Integrity

? Resolve suppressed listings, stranded inventory, broken variations, and catalog errors

? Build and manage product variations using flat files

? Fix catalog structures, merge duplicate ASINs, and correct listing attribution

? Reclaim listings under incorrect brand names or third-party seller accounts

? Manage bulk listing updates across multiple accounts

? Build SOPs for flat files, variation creation, and catalog maintenance



Brand Registry & Brand Authority

? Enroll brands in Amazon Brand Registry, including brands with pending or no active trademarks

? Execute Brand Registry through IP Accelerator and alternative pathways

? Identify and resolve listings attributed to incorrect or outdated brand names

? Execute brand name correction requests through Seller Support and Brand Registry

? Transfer listing ownership and brand attribution to the correct entity

? Manage the full reclamation process — from case opening to confirmed ownership transfer

? Handle brand entity consolidation and brand name corrections

? Manage storefronts and A+ Content coordination

? Execute hijacker removal, unauthorized seller reporting, and IP complaint filing

? Maintain a portfolio-level tracker for trademark status, Brand Registry, and protection



Walmart Operations

? Set up and manage Walmart Seller Center accounts for new brands

? Handle item setup, content score optimization, and catalog management

? Run and optimize Walmart Sponsored Products campaigns — if you own Amazon PPC, you will own this within 30 days

? Resolve Walmart-specific listing and catalog issues

? Build SOPs for Walmart onboarding and account management



What the First 90 Days Look Like

Days 1–30

? Full audit of all brand accounts (PPC, catalog, Brand Registry, hijackers, Walmart gaps)

? Deliver a written assessment with prioritized actions

Days 31–60

? Resolve suppressed listings

? Brand Registry enrolled or in progress for all brands

? PPC structures rebuilt or validated

? Walmart onboarding and advertising initiated

Days 61–90

? Full SOP library completed (PPC, catalog, onboarding, brand protection)

? Reporting system implemented

? Train at least one junior tea
mber on a core workflow



Performance Metrics

Performance will be evaluated based on:

? TACoS improvement across brands

? Speed of resolving suppressed listings and catalog issues

? Brand Registry enrollment completion rate

? Successful SOP system installation and team adoption



You Are the Right Fit If

? You have 4+ years in Amazon marketplace operations (agency or multi-account environment)

? You have managed multiple accounts simultaneously (8+ preferred)

? You have enrolled brands in Brand Registry, including without active trademarks

? You understand IP Accelerator and alternative enrollment pathways

? You have reclaimed listings and handled complex case escalations

? You have executed brand name corrections and listing ownership transfers

? You have basic Walmart Seller Center experience or have actively used it — deep Amazon mastery is the priority, but you must be willing to own Walmart fully within 30 days

? You have handled hijacker removal and IP complaints

? You are advanced with flat files, variations, and catalog fixes

? You actively use AI tools in your daily workflow — not occasionally, but as a core part of how you operate

? You have built SOPs and operational systems

? You think like an operator, not a task executor



Requirements

? Stable internet and professional home office

? Partial overlap with U.S. Eastern or Central time zones

? Available to start within 2–3 weeks

? Work samples required (SOP, flat file, campaign structure, or case outcome)



What We Offer

? $1,200 – $1,600/month based on experience

? Performance bonuses tied to portfolio growth and system delivery — top performers have a clear path to $2,000+/month as MontBlack scales

? Direct access to leadership — no micromanagement

? Remote, flexible work

? Clear growth path as MontBlack scales to 20+ brands

? A role built on operational discipline and systems ownership — if you take pride in running a clean, tight operation across multiple brands, this is the right environment



How to Apply

Use your favorite season as the subject line and include:

? Number of Amazon accounts managed simultaneously (and context: agency, in-house, freelance)

? One Brand Registry or listing reclamation case (problem + outcome)

? Experience with brands without active trademarks

? One example of a brand name correction or listing ownership transfer you executed

? Walmart Seller Center experience — if limited, explain how you would own it within 30 days

? Best ACoS or TACoS result (include spend and category)

? AI tools you use daily and how they improve your workflow

? Tools used daily (PPC, catalog, keyword research)

? Computer setup and number of monitors



Technical Question (Required)

Describe the difference between:

? Auto campaign keyword discovery

? Phrase match expansion

? Exact match scaling

And explain how you d
 when to move a keyword between them.



Upload Required

? Resume / CV (PDF)

? Internet speed screenshot

? One SOP, flat file template, or process document you created



Voice Recording (20–30 seconds)

Answer this out loud:

“A brand we represent has no registered trademark yet, their listings are attributed to the wrong brand name, a third-party seller has taken over their main ASIN, and the brand name on the listing belongs to a different entity we need to reclaim. Walk me through how you would approach fixing all of this.”

End your recording with:

“MontBlack protects legacy.”



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

title: Google Knowledge Panel Expert – Personal Brand Optimization
description:
I'm a 17-year-old entrepreneur based in New Zealand with a strong online presence — verified Google Knowledge Panel, 70K+ Instagram followers, 465K+ TikTok followers, press coverage from major NZ and international outlets, and podcast appearances. Despite having a verified Knowledge Panel, it is not consistently appearing in Google search results and needs to be fully built out and matured.

I have already worked with three other freelancers on this and have not gotten results. I need someone who genuinely understands how Google Knowledge Panels work — not someone who will guess, delay, or tell me to "just wait."



What I Need



Diagnose why my Knowledge Panel isn't appearing consistently in search

Fully optimize and build out the Knowledge Panel with all relevant information

Strengthen entity signals across the web (Wikipedia, Wikidata, structured data, authoritative sources)

Leverage existing press coverage, social profiles, and credentials to reinforce my entity

Deliver a clear report of what was done and why





Requirements



Proven experience with Google Knowledge Panels — please include examples or case studies

Understanding of entity-based SEO and structured data

Clear communication throughout the project

Must be able to diagnose the issue first before jumping to solutions

I will provide an example of a Knowledge Panel I'd like mine to model so you have a clear benchmark to work toward





To Apply

Please answer the following in your application:



Have you successfully built or optimized a Knowledge Panel before? Share an example.

What do you think might be causing a verified Knowledge Panel to not show in search?

What would your first steps be on this project?

What timeframe would you need to complete this project

title: Web Designer (No Code / Low Code CMS Specialist) - Project Based Contract

The role operates on a flexible schedule, with meetings aligned with Pacific Standard Time (PST) when required.



For the complete job description, responsibilities, and platform details, please review the full document below:







Minimum Qualifications



• At least 3 years of professional web design experience

• Hands on experience building websites using Wix, Squarespace, Shopify, and WordPress with Elementor

• A strong portfolio demonstrating modern, responsive website design

• Solid understanding of UX and UI principles, visual hierarchy, and responsive design

• Experience designing e commerce websites using Shopify or WooCommerce

• Comfortable working with Figma, CMS builders, and light HTML or CSS adjustments

• Strong attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions carefully



Role Overview



This is a project based contract role. Work will be assigned depending on client projects and internal team allocation.



Rate: Starting at $7 per hour, adjustable up to $8 per hour depending on experience and role fit.



Important Application Requirements



To be considered, applicants must submit complete application materials.



Required:



• Completed Web Designer Application Overview document

• Portfolio samples demonstrating relevant CMS and web design experience



The Application Overview is an important part of our evaluation process. Applications that are incomplete, missing the document, or do not demonstrate relevant experience will not move forward.



Apply Here:

Thank you, and we look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Click up Guru / Master to customize my account
description:
We are a growing Digital Marketing Agency looking for a ClickUp Guru to transform our workspace into a high-performance engine. Currently, our setup needs a complete overhaul to better serve our internal departments and streamline our client lifecycle.



The ideal candidate doesn't just know how to use ClickUp; they know how to build scalable systems, automate repetitive tasks, and integrate financial workflows.



Your Mission:

Audit & Reorganize: Review our current Hierarchy (Spaces, Folders, Lists) and restructure it for maximum clarity across departments (SEO, Ads, Creative, Content).



CRM Integration: Build out a robust Sales CRM within ClickUp to track leads, deal stages, and follow-ups.

Financial Workflow: Set up a system for tracking invoices and payments directly tied to client projects.

Automation Mastery: Implement ClickUp Automations and/or 
/Zapier integrations to reduce manual data entry.



Dashboard Creation: Build Executive and Departmental Dashboards so we can see agency health (KPIs, workloads, and deadlines) at a glance.



Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs): Document the new system so our team can easily adopt and maintain it.



Requirements:

Proven Experience: You have built complex ClickUp environments specifically for Agencies.

CRM Knowledge: Deep understanding of how to manage a sales pipeline within a project management tool.

Attention to Detail: You believe that if it isn't in ClickUp, it didn't happen.



Communication: Ability to explain complex workflows in simple terms.



How to Apply:

Please send a message on WHATSAPP at 
with the following:

Resume & History: A summary of your professional background.

Portfolio/Case Studies: Screenshots or descriptions of ClickUp environments you have built (specifically any CRM or Agency setups).



Skill List: Your proficiency level with ClickUp, Zapier/Make/N8N, and any accounting integrations.

The "Secret Word": Start your application with the word "Efficiency" so I know you read the full post.

title: Remote Real Estate Administrative Assistant / Transaction Coordinator
description:
**Some overlap with US West coast hours**



10 hours a week fixed plus transactions dependent for rest of time commitment. 



Overview

We are seeking a reliable Remote Real Estate Administrative Assistant / Transaction Coordinator to support our real estate operations in the United States.



This role combines transaction coordination, administrative support, and light social media marketing. You will help manage real estate transactions from contract to closing while assisting with simple marketing tasks such as posting listings and updates on social media.



This is a long-term part time remote position for someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with real estate documents and online tools.



Responsibilities

Transaction Coordination

Manage real estate files from contract to closing

Track important transaction deadlines

Maintain transaction checklists

Coordinate with agents, escrow/title companies, lenders, and clients

Upload and organize documents in transaction management systems

Ensure all required documents and disclosures are completed

Schedule inspections, appraisals, and closing appointments

Maintain accurate records of transaction status





Administrative Support

Maintain organized digital folders for transactions

Data entry and document preparation

Assist with listing preparation and property information entry

Update CRM records and transaction notes

Help manage calendars and reminders

Respond to simple internal
s and requests





Social Media & Marketing Support

Post new listings to
 and Instagram

Post updates such as “Just Listed”, “Pending”, and “Sold”

Update property information and descriptions

Assist with simple marketing graphics using tools like Canva

Schedule social media posts





Requirements

Strong English communication (written and verbal)

Excellent organizational skills

Ability to manage multiple deadlines

Reliable internet connection

Comfortable learning new software tools

Experience using Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)





Preferred Experience (Not Required)

- Real estate transaction coordination

- CRM experience

- Social media management

- Basic graphic design (Canva)





Experience with transaction platforms a plus such as:

Dotloop

Skyslope

DocuSign





Tools You May Use

Google Drive

Google Sheets

Real estate transaction software

Social media platforms

 and calendar systems





Training will be provided for the right candidate.

title: Industrial Designer/Engineer - Hard & Soft Goods
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking a talented and experienced Product Designer to join our design team. This role will focus on developing both hard goods (kitchenware, home décor, tableware, storage solutions) and soft goods (textiles, bedding, table linens, home accessories) for our seasonal product lines. The ideal candidate is proficient in Adobe Creative Suite, has strong textile and print design skills, and understands the product development process from concept through production.

 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Design & Development:

• Create original designs for hard and soft goods across multiple home product categories

• Develop patterns, prints, and textile designs using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

• Design seasonal collections that align with market trends and brand direction

• Produce technical sketches, renderings, and detailed specifications for manufacturing

• Create colorways and maintain brand color standards across product lines

• Develop presentation boards and line sheets using Adobe InDesign

Product Development & Production:

• Manage products from initial concept through final production

• Create comprehensive technical specification packages including materials, construction details, and finishes

• Collaborate with overseas vendors and factories to ensure design integrity

• Review and approve prototypes, samples, and pre-production units

• Provide feedback and revisions to manufacturing partners

• Support quality control processes and address production issues

• Assist with cost analysis and value engineering when needed

Collaboration & Communication:

• Work cross-functionally with merchandising, sourcing, and sales teams

• Present design concepts and seasonal line reviews to internal stakeholders

• Research market trends, competitive products, and consumer preferences

• Attend trade shows and markets as needed

• Maintain organized design files, asset libraries, and documentation

 

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience:

• 3-7 years of professional product design experience in hard and soft goods

• Proven track record designing home products, textiles, or related categories

• Experience working with overseas vendors and understanding of manufacturing processes

• Portfolio demonstrating strong design skills across multiple product categories

Technical Skills:

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Illustrator

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Photoshop

• Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign

• Strong understanding of textile and print design

• Ability to create camera-ready artwork and production files

• Knowledge of pattern development and repeats

• Technical specification writing experience

Design Capabilities:

• Strong understanding of color theory and trend forecasting

• Excellent visual communication and presentation skills

• Ability to translate concepts into commercially viable products

• Understanding of materials including ceramics, glass, metal, wood, textiles, and finishes

• Knowledge of manufacturing processes for both hard and soft goods

Professional Skills:

• Exceptional attention to detail and organizational abilities

• Strong time management skills with ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills

• Problem-solving mindset with focus on practical solutions

• Adaptable to changing priorities in a fast-paced environment

• Self-motivated with ability to work independently and as part of a team

 

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Bachelor's degree in Product Design, Textile Design, Industrial Design, or related field

• Experience in the wholesale/import industry

• Knowledge of product safety standards and compliance requirements

• Proficiency in Adobe After Effects or Premiere

• Experience with CAD software

• Familiarity with retail market and consumer trends

• Trade show and market experience



To apply: Please submit your application through the provided link below:

title: Software Engineer
description:
We’re hiring an AI Prompt Software Engineer to design, build, and optimize AI-powered workflows, tools, and applications that deliver real-world value. This role requires deep expertise in prompt engineering, including structuring, testing, and iterating prompts to achieve consistent, high-quality outputs across different use cases. You should be comfortable working with large language models and integrating them into products, automations, or internal systems.



You will be responsible for developing scalable AI solutions, improving performance through experimentation, and identifying opportunities to replace manual processes with intelligent automation. Experience with tools and technologies such as OpenAI APIs, LangChain, Python, JavaScript, REST APIs, and no-code/low-code platforms is highly desirable. Familiarity with vector databases, embeddings, and building AI agents is a strong advantage.



You must provide clear examples of previous projects, including what you built, the tools and technologies used, your specific contribution, and the measurable outcomes or impact achieved. Include AI-Eng in the subject when applying so I know you have read the application. We are looking for someone who can think independently, move quickly, and translate ideas into working solutions. Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and a builder mindset are essential, along with a genuine interest in staying up to date with the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

title: AI-First Ecommerce Operations Manager
description:
AI-First Ecommerce Operations Manager | Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time





About Us

Whisper Ear Care is a fast-growing ecommerce company headquartered in Hawaii. We make

products that solve swimmer’s ear infections without harsh chemicals. We sell on Amazon and

our own website. We're on the way to becoming the definitive ear care brand.



The Role

We're looking for an enthusiastic, AI-native operator to help run and grow the business. You'll

own day-to-day operations, find ways to grow sales, expand into new channels, and use AI tools

(with Claude as the foundation) to automate and scale everything you touch.



What You'll Own

? Operations — Track and order inventory, communicate with suppliers, build SOPs, and

create AI-powered tools to automate tasks

? Customer Experience — Own customer service, monitor reviews, and ensure

seamless ordering and delivery for every Whisper customer

? Amazon & Channel Growth — Optimize listings, create weekly reports on sales, and

lead expansion onto Walmart.com, Chewy, TikTok Shop, etc.

? Influencer & Creator Marketing — Build our affiliate program from scratch, manage

gifting pipelines, nurture relationships with creators

?
 & Shopify — Own drip and post order follow-up campaigns, find ways to increase

customer lifetime value, optimize our Shopify store

? AI & Automation — Audit manual tasks and eliminate them. Ask "can AI do this?"

before doing anything by hand



Who You Are

? Genuinely excited about AI. You constantly experiment with the latest models, have vibe

coded something before, and you know what Claude skills and Nano Banana are

? Have some prior experience with ecommerce or DTC brands. Bonus points for

experience with Amazon Seller Central, Walmart Marketplace, or TikTok Shop

? Strong English communicator, written and verbal



What We Offer

? Competitive salary

? Work on Philippines time zone



To Apply

Film and send us a 60 second video introducing yourself. Quickly tell us about your experience and why you would be a good candidate for the position. Follow these instructions exactly. We will not review your application unless it includes the 60 second video. Thanks!

title: DM Setter — Warm Instagram Outreach for US Marketing Agency (Commission-Based, Remote)
description:
We're a US-based marketing agency that helps home service businesses (roofers, painters, window cleaners, pressure washers, etc.) scale with paid ads and systems. We're hiring a DM setter to run warm outreach from our founder's Instagram account.



This is NOT cold outreach to strangers. You're messaging people who already follow us, engage with our content, or follow competitors in our space. These are warm leads who know the brand.



???



DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES:



• Send 100+ personalized DMs per day from our Instagram account

• Follow our proven scripts (opener, follow-up, qualifier, objection handling, booking)

• Qualify prospects based on: monthly revenue, team size, current marketing setup, and ad budget

• Book qualified prospects directly onto our sales calendar (GoHighLevel)

• Follow up with non-responders on a set cadence (Day 1, Day 3, Day 7)

• Log every conversation and outcome in a shared Google Sheet tracker

• Report daily: DMs sent, replies received, calls booked



WHAT WE PROVIDE (you don't need to figure anything out):



• Full SOP with step-by-step daily workflow

• Proven DM scripts for every scenario:

  • Cold opener for warm followers

  • Follow-up for no replies

  • Qualifier questions to filter serious prospects

  • Objection handling responses

  • Calendar booking scripts

• Daily lead lists — scraped, organized, and ready to go

• Access to our CRM (GoHighLevel) and booking system

• 1-on-1 onboarding call + ongoing Slack support

• You literally follow the system and execute



???



IDEAL CLIENT PROFILE (who you're targeting):



• Owner-operated service businesses doing $15,000-$30,000/month revenue

• 1-3 crews/employees

• Owner still answers the phone

• Has a website but it's not great

• No agency currently running their ads

• US-based, active on Instagram

• NOT big brands with polished marketing or 10K+ followers



???



COMPENSATION:



• 25% of month 1 revenue per closed deal

• Our minimum retainer is $1,500/month = $375+ per close minimum

• Many deals include revenue share on top, pushing per-deal value higher

• No cap on earnings — the more you book that close, the more you make

• Paid monthly once client payment clears

• Realistic range for strong performers: $1,500-$3,000+/month



???



MUST HAVE:



• Experience with Instagram DM outreach, appointment setting, or sales/lead gen

• Can commit 3-4 hours/day consistently (flexible scheduling)

• Strong written English — you need to sound like a real person, not a bot

• Knows how to have a genuine conversation (not copy-paste spam)

• Responsive on Slack — communicates proactively if something isn't working

• Reliable internet connection and a laptop/desktop



NICE TO HAVE:



• Experience with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar CRM

• Background in agency, home services, or B2B outreach

• Experience managing or scraping Instagram accounts

• Familiarity with Slack, Google Sheets, Calendly



???



ABOUT US:



We're a growing agency with active clients generating real revenue. This isn't a startup experiment — we have paying clients, proven ad campaigns, and a sales system that works. We need someone to fill the top of our funnel with qualified appointments so our closer can do what he does best.



We move fast, communicate in Slack, and value people who take ownership. If you follow the system and book calls, you will make money. Simple as that.



???



TO APPLY:



Send a message with:



1. A brief intro — who you are and your relevant experience

2. Have you done Instagram DM outreach or appointment setting before? If yes, what were your results?

3. How many hours per day can you commit?

4. Your expected monthly earnings (so we know we're aligned)

5. When you could start



Do NOT send a generic "I'm interested" message. We will ignore it.

title: Experienced Real Estate Closer! [A+ English]
description:
Please read entirely or else your application will be deleted!



1. This is for A+ English (no accents) CLOSERS. Please only apply if you have A+ English and you have closed a deal before.

2. Please submit a 
 recording link introducing yourself and why you are a committed teammate and why you are looking for a job.

3. Hours are Monday-Saturday from 8:30am-5:30pm Central Time Zone. Saturday hours can be discussed. [Confirm you are good with these hours.]

4. You must have clear audio/microphone and 16GB machine and it helps to have a dual-screen setup. [Tell me your PC specs]

5. Pay starts at $6.50 per hour for strong candidates with strong acquisitions closing experience. [Confirm]



We are looking for somebody with strong closing ability that can take a lead and turn it into a signed contract. If you have experience with acquisitions or land, that is also helpful! We can train, but we need a true closer, not just an ISA or appointment setter. We have leads-- we just need a strong, committed, and motivated closer.
