Only applications submitted via the above form will be reviewed.

title: Remote Research & Writing Training Program (Paid)
description:
Church Nonprofit – Character and Reliability Required

Our church nonprofit is building a long-term training and selection program for individuals who may later support our nonprofit initiatives.

This is a paid remote training program where participants complete structured learning modules and produce written and presentation-based work.

However, before anything else, character and reliability come first.

________________________________________

Character and Work Ethic Come First

We carefully evaluate character during the first sessions.

Many people may be intelligent or academically capable. But if we do not see reliability, respect, and strong work ethic early on, we will not be able to continue working with that candidate.

We look for people who:

•	follow through on commitments

•	communicate respectfully

•	provide consistent progress updates

•	complete assignments they start

•	take responsibility seriously

If someone stops responding, disappears, abandons work midway, or fails to communicate, this shows a reliability problem and the program will end for that applicant.

Our nonprofit depends on people who finish the work they start.

If you are dependable, responsible, and respectful in communication, you will likely do very well here.

________________________________________

About the Training Program

Participants complete structured study modules and produce:

•	research-based essays

•	PowerPoint presentations with speaker notes

•	organized written work based on assigned topics

The program evaluates:

•	writing ability

•	research and analysis

•	communication

•	discipline and consistency

•	professionalism and integrity

This is designed for applicants who enjoy studying and learning and want to strengthen their academic and professional skills.

________________________________________

Pay and Program Structure

Pay: ?4,500 per completed program

Program format:

•	15 structured modules

•	8-week session

•	self-paced and competency-based

•	strong applicants often finish in about 7 weeks

Each module requires:

•	APA-style essay

•	PowerPoint presentation with speaker notes

•	proper citations and references

Module 15 is a final capstone project.

________________________________________

Available Program Tracks (Choose One)

Applicants must select one program track.

Program A – Criminal Justice and Community Safety

Topics include justice systems, criminology, crime prevention, and community safety.

Program B – Healthcare Administration and Community Health

Topics include healthcare systems, policy, management, and community health programs.

Program C – Nursing, Health Promotion, and Community Care

Topics include community health nursing, prevention strategies, and patient education.

Program D – United States Studies

Topics include U.S. history, society, culture, and civic institutions.

________________________________________

Integrity and Original Work

All work must be original.

AI tools may be used only for support, such as:

•	brainstorming

•	outlining

•	grammar support

However:

•	copying or plagiarism is not allowed

•	sources must be cited properly in APA style

•	originality checks are used

________________________________________

Who Should Apply

You should have:

•	a college degree, or

•	a strong academic background with strong reading and writing ability

You must also be:

•	studious and intellectually curious

•	a quick learner

•	strong in writing and organized thinking

•	comfortable communicating through WhatsApp

•	able to provide daily progress updates

•	dependable and responsive

•	respectful and professional

This opportunity works best for people who take commitments seriously and complete the work they start.

________________________________________

What This Can Lead To

Applicants who demonstrate strong work ethic, honesty, and consistent performance may be invited into ongoing paid work supporting our nonprofit programs.

We continue working only with people who show:

•	reliability

•	consistent communication

•	dependable work quality

•	professionalism and trustworthiness

________________________________________

How to Apply

Send your application through WhatsApp:


Please include:

1.	Updated resume

2.	Full name and timezone

3.	Daily availability (hours per day)

4.	Program choice (A, B, C, or D)

5.	Writing sample (1–2 pages, APA style)

6.	PowerPoint sample (5–10 slides with speaker notes)

7.	Confirmation statement:

"I understand originality checks are used. AI may only be used for assistance. I will submit only original work and include proper citations where required."

________________________________________

Additional Documents

Please also
 the following to:


 

Required:

•	Resume / portfolio

•	School diploma (front and back)

•	Transcript of Records (front and back)

For nursing graduates:

•	BSN diploma

•	CHED verification of degree equivalency

•	RN license copy if available

________________________________________

Qualified applicants may be invited for a phone interview.

Please read the full post carefully before asking questions already answered here.

________________________________________

title: Tutoring Remote Work - Fresh Nursing Grads or RNs ONLY
description:
Online Nursing Healthcare Tutor Clinical Documentation Improvement Track



“Fresh Nursing Graduates or Registered Nurses Welcome”



Online Nursing / Healthcare Tutor

Clinical Documentation Improvement (CDI) Track

Fresh Nursing Graduates or Registered Nurses Welcome

Nonprofit Academic Initiative – Philippines

Gig-Based Engagement

We are currently in the early development stage of a nonprofit academic initiative focused on strengthening healthcare education and building a future Clinical Documentation Improvement (CDI) group in the Philippines.

At this stage, the program is still being carefully developed. Planning and discussions are ongoing as we structure the initiative and determine how the training and tutoring components will operate.

Our long-term goal is to create structured opportunities for nursing graduates to participate in Clinical Documentation Improvement work.

CDI is a growing field in healthcare where nurses often perform very well because of their clinical background, critical thinking ability, and understanding of patient care. With additional exposure to medical coding concepts and documentation standards, nurses can transition into valuable documentation improvement roles.

We are seeking Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) graduates, including fresh graduates, who can assist with online tutoring and academic guidance in healthcare-related subjects.

Registered Nurses are preferred, but an RN license is not required.

This role begins on a gig basis while the initiative is still developing. If the program progresses successfully, a more structured engagement may be discussed in the future.

________________________________________

Role Responsibilities

•	Provide structured online tutoring in healthcare and nursing subjects

•	Assist students in improving academic performance

•	Support understanding of clinical documentation practices

•	Introduce basic awareness of medical coding concepts

•	Help develop foundational materials for future CDI training

•	Monitor student progress and provide academic feedback

________________________________________

Qualifications

•	Bachelor of Science in Nursing required

•	Fresh graduates are welcome to apply

•	RN license preferred but not mandatory

•	Strong academic performance

•	Interest in clinical documentation or medical coding is an advantage

•	Professional, responsible, and detail-oriented

•	Good communication skills

________________________________________

Compensation

This is a gig-based opportunity with performance-based compensation.

Because the initiative is still in development, compensation structure may be adjusted as the program evolves.

Further details may be discussed with selected applicants.

________________________________________

Application Requirements

All documents must be submitted in clear PDF format scanned at 600 DPI or higher for clarity.

Please submit the following:

1.	Updated resume or portfolio

2.	BSN diploma (front and back, even if blank)

3.	Transcript of Records (front and back)

4.	CHED verification for equivalency of your BSN degree

5.	If you hold an RN license, include a copy (front and back)



Send all documents to:





Incomplete or unclear submissions will not be reviewed.

Thank you.

title: Experienced Buyer for ecommerce company
description:
Our US-based ecommerce company is looking for a very experienced and excellent Buyer (there are positions for apparel, home décor and collectables) who is hard-working, organized, analytical, with several years of experience in ecommerce. 

It is a FULL-time position (40h/week). This is NOT an entry-level role. 



The Buyer sources new product vendors and grows the assortment offering on our brands’ sites;

oversees and maintains inventory as well as researches, analyzes, and forecasts current and future buying trends, markets, styles, and products with attention to specified target market and demographics. This role supports the curation of our product assortments, develops and maintains relationships with wholesalers and suppliers while leading negotiation of contracts with wholesalers and suppliers. 



Omni Retail Enterprises operates a lifestyle portfolio of digital storefronts and communities including home decor, apparel, collectables, fitness, and more, with millions of consumers around the globe. 



Skills & Qualifications:



• Strong English proficiency, both written and spoken. 

• 3+ years’ experience as a Buyer, preferably in apparel, home decor, or collectables

• Experience in retail and ecommerce 



Experience in Platforms:



• Proficient in Shopify, Google Analytics, and Excel. 



Work Schedule:



• Full-time position (40h/week)

• US work hours (CST)



Key Responsibilities:



• Qualifies and negotiates with vendors to find the best sales price and may include bid prices and negotiation techniques, plus review of written documents

• Acquires information concerning an item’s condition, type, rarity or value

• Prepares data for financial records: invoices, purchase orders and other related documents

• Performs financial analysis to determine savings, calculates quantity discounts and negotiates the best sales price when purchasing large quantities of goods

• Arranges payments through bank drafts or money orders to purchase items

• Maintains inventory that includes verifying inventory levels, choosing new items, returning expired items or obsolete merchandise 

• Tracks purchases, monitors vendor quality, and maintains a current database of vendor information

• Negotiates contracts with suppliers to secure favorable terms, including pricing, delivery schedules, and quality specifications

• Develops and implement purchasing strategies aligned with the company’s business goals and operational needs

• Maintains commercial contracts with clients, suppliers, and other business partners

• Researches and evaluates suppliers, considering factors such as quality, pricing, and market trends

• Analyzes market trends, ensuring the organization gets the best value for its purchases

• Implements strategies for procuring, storing, and distributing goods and services

• Oversees financial analyses related to the department’s budget 

• Manages procurement activities, including purchasing supplies and communicating company specifications to suppliers

• Ensures the company complies with legal, regulatory, and ethical requirements 

• Evaluates departmental policies and procedures to ensure alignment with industry standards and changes in law or technology

• Participates in cross-functional projects aimed at improving efficiency, profitability, quality, and customer service

• Collaborates with other senior tea
mbers to analyze potential problems impacting work

• Recommends improvements, new products, quality enhancements, or operational efficiencies

• Handles multiple projects simultaneously and prioritize tasks based on urgency

• Stays on top of trends in terms of supplement innovation and industry demand 



Resume



Please submit your information and resume detailing your relevant experience, skill set, and why you're the perfect fit for this position. Link to submit this information: 





We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Social Media Manager – Paid Ads Expert
description:
We are looking for an experienced Social Media Manager / Ads Expert to manage and scale our paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms. The ideal candidate is data-driven, creative, and capable of optimizing campaigns to drive visibility, engagement, and growth for our social media pages.



Key Responsibilities

-Plan, launch, and manage paid advertising campaigns across Meta 
 & Instagram), and TikTok Ads

-Monitor and optimize campaign performance to improve ROI and conversions

-Analyze ad analytics, audience insights, and market trends

-Provide data-driven recommendations to improve overall social media growth

-Test creatives, audiences, and ad strategies to identify high-performing campaigns

-Track campaign performance and prepare regular reports

-Manage and improve the visibility and growth of the company’s social media pages





Qualifications

-At least 3-5 years of hands-on experience managing paid advertising campaigns

-Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field

-Proven experience running ads on Meta 
 & Instagram), and TikTok Ads

-Strong understanding of social media platforms and ad performance

-Ability to plan, launch, optimize, and scale ad campaigns

-Data-driven mindset with strong knowledge of analytics and performance tracking

-Ability to analyze data and identify trends and growth opportunities

-Creative, proactive, and able to work independently



Kindly send us a message on Microsoft Teams at 
 and send your CV/resume there so we can discuss further details.

title: Graphic Designer (Streetwear Brand)
description:
We’re looking for a creative and culturally in-tune Graphic Designer to join Banana Lagoon - an Australian streetwear brand known for bold designs, premium quality, and limited releases.  ?



This role is perfect for someone who understands streetwear culture and can translate ideas into standout visuals that drive hype, identity, and sales.



You’ll be responsible for designing graphics across apparel, social media, and marketing campaigns, helping shape the visual direction of upcoming drops and collections.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Design original graphics for hoodies, t-shirts, hats, accessories, etc.

 • Create visuals for product drops, campaigns, and social media content

 • Develop cohesive branding across collections and seasonal releases

 • Work closely with the team to bring creative concepts to life

 • Prepare print-ready files for garment production

 • Stay on top of streetwear, fashion, and design trends



Requirements:

 • Strong portfolio showcasing streetwear, fashion, or bold graphic work

 • Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop)

 • Understanding of garment printing and design specs

 • Ability to design for a youthful, trend-driven audience

 • Creative, fast-moving, and able to execute ideas quickly

 • Bonus: experience working with clothing brands or drop-based models



Ideal Candidate:

 • Deep understanding of streetwear culture and aesthetics

 • Strong eye for typography, layout, and branding

 • Able to create designs that feel exclusive and “drop-worthy”

 • Passionate about fashion, design, and building a brand

title: Weekend Logistics Coordinator (Overnight Shifts – Eastern Time)
description: We are seeking a dedicated Logistics Coordinator to cover weekend overnight shifts. The schedule is Friday, Saturday, and Sunday from 8 PM to 10 AM Eastern Time. This role offers steady coverage, ensuring smooth operations during weekend overnight and early morning hours. You’ll monitor driver tracking, provide customer updates, and handle administrative tasks. If you’re reliable and have weekend availability, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC: Our Vision for Transformative Music



Pex Life Records is an independent label where urban music meets personal development. Founded by Wilmarck, we create high-quality tracks that resonate with the motivation of Tony Robbins, blended with the commercial sound of artists like Kanye West and Drake. Our music is purpose-driven, focusing on critical life areas: health, financial literacy, peak performance, and spirituality.



You will be joining a brand with a strong, engaged audience of over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers. Your work will directly contribute to inspiring and uplifting thousands through music.-----The Role: Drive Revenue, Build a Team, Shape a Brand



We are seeking a highly motivated Music Manager to lead our sales, operations, and team development. This is a pivotal role for a professional ready to commit to a 45-50 hour/week position that offers substantial commission potential and a clear path to high earnings.



Key Areas of Impact:

Sales & Business Development: Lead client acquisition by pitching proposals to songwriting job boards and driving profits to achieve ambitious sales targets.

Team Leadership: Recruit, hire, train, and inspire contractors and staff to ensure stellar performance and successful new releases.

Operations & Finance: Manage contracts, maintain essential financial records (bookkeeping), and ensure compliance and seamless communication across all stakeholders.

Customer Experience: Be the face of the company, creating memorable customer experiences, explaining product/service prices, and handling key inquiries.



Compensation & Uncapped Earning Potential



This is a performance-driven role with a clear path to significant monthly income through our incentive program.

Base & Growth: The hourly rate starts at $2.81 USD plus commission. The initial 10 hours/week commitment quickly scales up to 45 hours/week within 45 days, allowing for a rapid increase in base earnings.

Monthly Compensation Range: $505–$900 Guaranteed Base + Generous Commission.



Compensation Structure by Target Revenue Goal:

Achieve $1,200 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $675 Minimum. Commission Rate: 10% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement.

Achieve $2,400 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $900 Minimum. Commission Rate: 15% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: Social Security System & Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing.



Flexibility and Structure:



100% Remote Position: Work from anywhere.

Core Availability: Sunday–Thursday, 6:30 PM EST – 3:00 AM EST.

Work/Life Balance: We offer Flexible Scheduling (choose your working days/hours) and Job Sharing options.

Prospect Response Disclaimer: Maintain key client relationships by being available for 3-5 quick, 5–15 minute responses per week within a designated 8-hour window (e.g., 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST).



What We're Looking For (Skills & Qualities)



We need a relentless executor with an independent spirit and high integrity.

Essential: Superior proposal writing, persistence, time management, and strong English speaking/writing skills.

Ideal Candidate: Flexible, eager to learn, competitive, and receptive to constructive criticism.



Your Path to Full-Time: The Paid Audition



We skip the traditional hiring steps and go straight to evaluating your work. The process is designed to be fair, fast, and merit-based:

1 Submit your proposal.

2 Pass a screening exercise.

3 Participate in an interview.

4 Top candidates are selected for a paid audition to ensure a mutual fit before a full-time offer is extended.

If you are ready to be a crucial leader in a high-growth, mission-driven music company, apply now!



Application Instructions:



Demonstrate your expertise in sales management (client acquisition, appointment setting, and closing calls) in your proposal. To ensure you've read these details, please begin your proposal with the phrase "purple elephant."

We need a relentless executor with an independent spirit and high integrity.

Essential: Superior proposal writing, persistence, time management, and strong English speaking/writing skills.

Your Path to Full-Time: The Paid Audition

title: Real Estate Lead Manager
description:
Looking to hire Lead Managers



Role: Lead managers specialize in acquiring new properties that can then be sold to other investors at a profit. This individual would be using our marketing and selling system to vet prospective sellers and qualify them. This is a long term, full time position.



You will be responsible for:

1) Reviewing and prioritizing call lists

2) Making outbound calls to connect with interested sellers

3) Qualifying opportunities

4) Managing a pipeline of prospective sellers

5) Submitting performance KPIs



Requirements:

At least 3 years in real estate

At least 2 year strong experience as a Lead Manager or Acquisition Manager

Must be result oriented, go getter and honest



Please send your resume and audio recording (need both) to 
 you.

title: Remote Appointment Setter (Philippines-Based)
description:
Please read entire description before applying.



Due to the low number of applicants, we are still hiring for this position.



We are seeking a highly motivated and reliable Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to join our fast-growing team as an Appointment Setter.



Your role will be to engage with warm leads, build rapport, and book qualified appointments for our sales team. If you are hungry to grow, coachable, and results-driven, this is an incredible opportunity to earn great commissions and bonuses while working from home.



Responsibilities:

Reach out to prospects through Instagra
ssaging, and follow-ups.

Qualify leads and schedule appointments for our sales team.

Maintain clear records of conversations and updates in our CRM as well as KPI Tracker

Meet daily and weekly booking targets.

Collaborate with team leads to improve scripts and conversion rates

Attend 2 zoo
etings weekly. (Monday & Thursday)



Requirements:

Excellent written and spoken English (near-native level)

Strong communication and interpersonal skills

Organized, detail-oriented, and consistent

Reliable internet connection and home office setup

Able to work during U.S. EST business hours

Only applicants who are eager to drive sales past base pay will be considered.



Compensation: Make up to $1750 a month!

Base Salary: $250/month (paid $125 bi-weekly)

Commission: $50 per closed deal

+Bonuses

Commission Structure (Resets Monthly)

$250 Salary. $125 bi-weekly

$50 Commission Per Deal



Bonus Structure

5 closes $100 bonus

10 closes $200 Bonus

15 closes $300 Bonus

20 closes $500 Bonus



5 Deals $250 Base + 5 Commissions $250 + $100 Bonus = $600

10 Deals $250 Base + 10 Commissions $500 + $200 Bonus = $950

15 Deals $250 Base + 15 Commissions $750 + $300 Bonus = $1300

20 Deals $250 Base + 20 Commissions $1000 + $500 Bonus = $1750



For Payments:

Transferwise or Paypal



Why Join Us:

Work from home and earn competitive pay in USD

Generous bonuses and commissions

Supportive and growth-focused team

Long-term career opportunities for high performers



How to Apply:

Send us your application with:

A short introduction about yourself

Your relevant experience

Why you think you’d be a great fit for this role

Do you have prior setting experience?



To prove you read this entire job post, please include your favorite color somewhere in your application.



Qualified applicants will receive a zoom invite for this Wednesday - March 
 EST. Please check US dates and times to ensure you will make the interview. If you are unable to attend at that time, please specify in your application. 



This will be the first round of interviews. Applicants will be interviewed one at a time for 5 minutes. Please wait in the room until we get to you and have your camera on and ready.



We’re looking for someone who is eager to learn, self-motivated, and ready to grow with us. If that sounds like you, we want to hear from you!

title: Bookkeeper AU
description:
Bookkeeper (Xero Experience Required) | Full-Time / Part-Time | Work From Home



We are looking for a detail-oriented and experienced Bookkeeper to join our growing team. This is a fully remote role offering stable work, fixed day-shift hours, and long-term opportunities.



If you have strong bookkeeping experience, especially using Xero, and have worked with accounting firms or multiple clients, we’d love to hear from you!



 Job Type:

Full-Time or Part-Time (depending on availability)

Permanent Work From Home

Fixed Day Shift Schedule



Requirements:

Minimum 2 years bookkeeping experience

Australian bookkeeping experience MANDATORY

Strong experience using Xero (required)

Experience with MYOB or QuickBooks is a plus

Previous experience working in an accounting firm is highly preferred

Strong understanding of accounting and bookkeeping principles

Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple tasks

Good English communication skills (written and verbal)

Reliable internet connection and work setup



Key Responsibilities:

Bookkeeping & Financial Management

Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records in Xero

Record all financial transactions (sales, purchases, receipts, payments)

Maintain general ledger and chart of accounts

Track expenses and allocate costs correctly

Monitor cash flow and flag issues proactively



Accounts Payable & Receivable

Process supplier invoices and payments (Accounts Payable)

Prepare customer invoices and follow up payments (Accounts Receivable)

Prepare and manage invoicing (as authorized)



Reconciliation & Reporting

Reconcile bank accounts and credit cards

Enter and reconcile bills and expenses

Complete end-of-month reconciliations

Prepare financial reports (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)



Payroll & Compliance

Process payroll accurately and on time (wages, PAYG, superannuation)

Ensure superannuation payments are completed on schedule

Prepare and lodge BAS (GST, PAYG, Fuel Tax Credits)

Maintain audit-ready financial records

Ensure compliance with ATO requirements and deadlines



Collaboration

Liaise with accountants and provide year-end documentation

Support compliance and financial reporting requirements



Benefits:

Fully Remote / Work From Home

Fixed Day Shift Schedule

HMO Benefit

Stable long-term role

Supportive and professional team environment



How to Apply:



Please submit:

1. Link to your updated CV

2. Link to your introduction video (required)

3. A short summary of your experience based on the requirements

4. Sample clients or industries you’ve supported (if applicable)



Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: NDIS Bookkeeper
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented NDIS Bookkeeper to support billing, invoicing, and financial administration for NDIS service providers. This role involves managing NDIS invoices, reconciling payments, resolving claim issues, and ensuring compliance with NDIS pricing arrangements.



The ideal candidate has experience with NDIS billing systems, invoice reconciliation, and financial record management.



Key Responsibilities

- Prepare and submit NDIS invoices using correct support line items

- Reconcile invoices, payments, and outstanding claims

- Investigate and resolve rejected or unpaid NDIS claims

- Follow up with plan managers and stakeholders regarding invoice status

- Maintain accurate financial records and bookkeeping data

- Review billing to identify discrepancies or missing payments

- Ensure compliance with NDIS pricing arrangements and billing requirements

- Support improvements to invoicing and reconciliation processes



Requirements

- Experience in NDIS bookkeeping, billing, or finance support

- Strong understanding of NDIS line items and pricing arrangements

- Experience handling NDIS claims, invoices, and reconciliations

- High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

- Ability to investigate and resolve billing discrepancies

- Strong communication skills when coordinating with plan managers and clients



Preferred

- Experience using NDIS portals, Xero, MYOB, or other accounting systems

- Background supporting NDIS providers or disability services



Benefits:

Fully Remote / Work From Home

Fixed Day Shift Schedule

HMO Benefit

Stable long-term role

Supportive and professional team environment



How to Apply:



Please submit:

1. Link to your updated CV

2. Link to your introduction video (preferred)

3. A short summary of your experience based on the requirements

4. Sample clients or industries you’ve supported (if applicable)



Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Elite Level Media Buyer (NewsBreak)
description:
We are hiring a killer media buyer to help us scale on NewsBreak.



Direct NewsBreak experience is a plus, but it is not required. We understand that experienced NewsBreak buyers are rare. We are open to hiring someone with strong Meta or other paid traffic experience who can quickly learn a new platform and figure out what works.



We are looking for someone who already knows how to buy media at a high level and does not need constant direction.



What We’re Looking For:



The right person must have real media buying experience and be able to make decisions independently. This is not an entry-level role, and it is not a fit for someone who needs to be told exactly what to do every day.



You should know all the major metrics and you should know how to use those numbers to evaluate performance, spot problems, and make profitable decisions.



Requirements: 



- Strong media buying experience on Meta or another major paid traffic platform

- Experience managing thousands of dollars per day in ad spend

- Strong understanding of campaign metrics and how they impact profitability

- Ability to test efficiently and interpret results correctly

- Ability to know when to cut, when to hold, and when to scale

- Self-sufficient and confident in building strategy without being micromanaged

- Comfortable adapting to a new platform and learning quickly



Do Not Apply If:



- You need to be told exactly what to do every day

- You have very little media buying experience

- You have never managed meaningful daily spend

- You do not know how to read campaign data and make decisions from it

- You are a button-pusher instead of a real strategist

- You wait around for someone else to hand you the answer



Ideal Candidate:



The ideal candidate is someone who has already spent serious money on paid traffic, understands how to manage campaigns profitably, and can bring that same skill set to NewsBreak. We are looking for someone who can think independently, test intelligently, and find winning strategies on their own.



To apply, D
 the info below:



1. Platforms you’ve bought on

2. Highest daily spend managed

3. Verticals/offers you’ve run

4. One campaign you scaled successfully

5. What you look at first when performance drops

title: Affiliate Growth Manager (Instagram & Amazon) Figgy’s Events | Luxury Event Planning + Design (New York)
description:
We are hiring an Affiliate Growth Manager to build and scale a content-driven revenue system across Instagram and Amazon.



This is a monetization role. Content is the input, revenue is the outcome. You will take high-volume, high-end event content and convert it into structured, repeatable, shoppable systems.



This role starts freelance with a clear path to long-term or full-time based on performance.



Proof of Work Required (Applications without this will not be reviewed):



Submit:



• At least one example of content you turned into revenue

• A live Amazon storefront, product collection, or shoppable system you built or managed

• A brief breakdown of your process and the result



What You Will Own:



• Build and manage Amazon storefront structure, product libraries, and link strategy

• Convert past and ongoing event content into shoppable outputs

• Create repeatable formats such as “shop this setup” and “what I used”

• Systemize product identification, tagging, and categorization across themes

• Establish workflows that allow content to be reused and monetized continuously

• Track performance and refine for conversion



Content (Execution, Not the Focus):



• Direct and execute short-form video tied to affiliate outcomes

• Maintain a clean, elevated visual standard aligned with a luxury brand

• Organize large content volumes for fast retrieval and reuse



Technology + Systems (Required):



• You actively use advanced tools to increase speed, output, and quality

• You use AI, automation, or workflow systems beyond basic prompts

• You can clearly explain what you use, how you use it, and what it produces

• You build systems, not just complete tasks



This is not a graphic design or Canva-based role.



What You Must Have:



• Proven experience monetizing content through affiliate systems

• Direct experience with Amazon Storefront, LTK, TikTok Shop, or similar

• Strong understanding of how content converts, not just how it looks

• Ability to build structured systems from unstructured content

• High visual standards aligned with a premium brand

• Ability to operate independently and take ownership



What You Are Working With:



• Over 3 years of continuous event content from weekly, highly curated themed events

• Direct access to real product sourcing and purchasing history

• A non-repetitive content library across multiple themes and styles

• A nearly fully booked 2026 schedule, providing ongoing weekly content



This is a build-and-scale opportunity, not a starting point.



Position Details:



• Freelance to start, with long-term or full-time potential

• Remote

• Consistent weekly communication required

• Performance-driven role tied to measurable results



How to Apply:



• Submit required proof of work

• Include a brief explanation of how you approach monetizing content

• List the tools, systems, and workflows you actively use

title: Software Developer (AI Integration Expert)
description:
PropZap — Build the Intelligence Behind a Platform That Millions Will Rely On|



PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



But we're not just building software.



We're building the future of how people buy, sell, and experience real estate. And AI is at the center of that future.

Every agent who runs their business through the platform. Every client making one of the biggest decisions of their life. Every interaction, every message, every 
nt of clarity in a process that has always been complicated. That's what we're improving. That's what we're building toward.



AI is not a feature we're adding to the roadmap. It's becoming the foundation of how the platform thinks, responds, and grows. And we need someone who already knows how to build that, not someone learning on the job.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Role: Software Developer (AI Integration Expert)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Role Type: Full-Time

Compensation: TBD



We believe great developers are force multipliers. We are willing to pay premium for developers who can integrate AI into real systems, think independently, and contribute to something that is built to last.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America

Why This Role Is a Big Opportunity



- Be part of the team shaping how AI gets built into a platform at scale

- Contribute to decisions that define the product, not just execute on them

- Build things that agents and clients interact with every single day

- Work on something that compounds, where every system you build makes the next one more powerful



If you've been sitting on real AI experience but working on projects that go nowhere, this is your chance to put that expertise into something that is actually growing. Fast.



--------------------------------------------------------------

What You'll Be Working On



You'll help design and build the intelligent systems that power the platform, including:

- AI integrations across backend services and workflows

- APIs and third-party integrations that leverage AI capabilities

- Internal tools and automations powered by AI

- Data pipelines and system architecture that support AI features

- Frontend contributions as needed to bring AI features to life



This role is about understanding how AI fits into a real product and building it in a way that works for the people using it, not just the people building it.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Responsibilities



AI Integration and Development

- Integrate AI tools, models, and services into existing and new platform features

- Build reliable, scalable systems that bring AI capabilities into production

- Connect AI to real workflows that agents and clients experience directly

- Stay ahead of where AI is going and bring that knowledge into the product



Back-End Engineering

- Design and build server-side systems that support AI-powered features

- Develop and maintain RESTful APIs that connect AI capabilities to the platform

- Ensure systems are secure, efficient, and well-documented



Code Quality and Ownership

- Write clean, maintainable, and production-ready code

- Review and contribute to a codebase built for the long term

- Document integrations, architecture, and processes thoroughly



Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Work closely with other developers on the platform team

- Contribute to architecture decisions and technical direction

- Support frontend requirements when needed to complete AI-driven features



Quality and Troubleshooting

- Test across environments and iterate based on real usage

- Debug issues across different parts of the system

- Build with reliability and performance in mind from the start



--------------------------------------------------------------

Who This Role Is Built For

- Someone who has already built AI into real products and knows what it actually takes in production.

- Someone who sees AI not as a trend to follow, but as a tool to wield with precision and purpose.

- Someone who wants to be part of building something that outlasts any single feature, and who understands that the best AI  work is invisible to the user but felt in everything they do.



Strong candidates typically:

- Have hands-on experience integrating AI into software products that real people use

- Know how to make AI practical, not just impressive

- Are comfortable working across backend systems and APIs

- Write clean, scalable code that others can build on

- Can work independently, move fast, and make thoughtful technical decisions

- Are energized by the idea of being early to something that is going to be very big



--------------------------------------------------------------

Technology Mindset

We're not hiring based on one specific stack or one specific AI tool.

We're looking for developers who know how to make AI work inside products that people actually rely on.

You should be comfortable with:



AI tools, APIs, and frameworks used in production environments

- Backend systems and server-side logic

- API design and third-party integrations

- Data structures and pipelines that support AI features

- Debugging across environments

- Writing production-ready code



--------------------------------------------------------------

What You Gain

- The opportunity to shape how AI is integrated into a platform that is scaling across North America

- A long-term role inside a company that is moving with real urgency and real vision

- Direct impact on how millions of people will experience real estate through technology

- Ownership over meaningful work, not isolated tasks handed down from above

- The chance to grow into a bigger role as the platform grows around you



The window to be early to something like this does not stay open forever.



--------------------------------------------------------------

How to Apply



Send the following to: 



- Resume

- Portfolio / GitHub (required)

- Summary of AI integration projects you've built or contributed to

- Expected compensation

- Internet speed test link

- Any DISC test result (if available)

- Intro video (optional but preferred)



Subject Line: Software Developer (AI Integration Expert) – Your Name



--------------------------------------------------------------

PropZap is moving fast. The platform is growing. And the people who help build the intelligence behind it will look back on this as the role that changed the trajectory of their career.

If that sounds like something worth being part of, we want to hear from you.

title: Revenue & Listing Optimization Specialist (Boutique Exclusive Short-Term Rental Company)
description:
WHO WE ARE: 

We are a high-end exclusive boutique short-term rental (STR) and design/launch company managing and launching high value properties. Current portfolio includes 6 high performing properties with growth of an additional 10 by end of the year.  



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT: 

In working with us, you can expect to find a supportive, fast-growing team that values clear communication, ownership, and pride in your work. We trust our team to take initiative and solve problems, and we’re here to support you every step of the way.  



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR: 

We are looking for a data-driven, detail-oriented Revenue & Listing Optimization Specialist who can directly improve our properties performance, increase occupancy, and maximize revenue.  This is a performance-driven role, you will own these outcomes with the team's support. 



YOUR OBJECTIVES:

- Maximize revenue across all properties

- Optimize listings for conversion and visibility

- Support owner experience through clear reporting and insights

- Help build scalable systems for growth



DETAILED RESPONSIBILITIES FOR SUCCESS:  



>Revenue Optimization (PRIMARY FOCUS):

- Manage and optimize pricing using PriceLabs 

- Adjust pricing strategies based on:

    - Demand

    - Seasonality

    - Local events

    - Market trends

- Monitor occupancy and revenue performance across listings 



>Listing Optimization:

- Improve listing performance on:

    - Airbnb

    - Vrbo

    - Other Online Travel Agencies (OTA's)

- Optimize:

   - Titles

   - Descriptions

   - Photo order

    - Amenities

- Identify opportunities to increase conversion rates



>Performance Tracking & Insights:

- Track key metrics:

    - Occupancy rate

    - Average daily rate (ADR)

    - Revenue per property

- Provide insights and recommendations:

   - What’s working

    - What needs improvement

    - What actions to take next



>Owner/Client Experience Support:

- Assist with owner reporting (clear, professional, accurate)

- Support invoicing processes

- Help communicate performance improvements



>Systems & SOP Development (SECONDARY):

- Build and organize systems in Notion

- Create SOPs for repeatable processes

- Help structure internal workflows



YOUR PROVEN EXPERIENCE INCLUDES: 

- Must have strong knowledge and experience with:

    - PriceLabs Pricing Software Platform

   -  Hospitable Management Software

    - Airbnb, Vrbo, and other OTA platforms

- Data oriented; understand complex data and dashboard reporting 

- Familiarity with Notion platform



OTHER INHERENT SKILLS: 

- Analytical thinking and data interpretation

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to make decisions based on data (not guesswork)

- Organized and systems-oriented

- Clear written communication



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, MUST follow ALL instructions:



1. Start your application with this exact phrase:  "Optimizing Revenue is WHAT I DO"



2. Submit a 2–3 minute Loom video answering:

- How you have improved listing performance or pricing before

- How you approach pricing strategy

- A system or process you’ve built 

- Answer this scenario:

“A property has 40% occupancy next month, while similar listings are at 65%"

What steps would you take to fix this?



3. Attach your resume



Thank you for taking the time to apply, look forward to connecting!

title: Sales Team: AI Sales Strategist & Growth Advisor
description:
About the Job

This isn't a traditional sales role. We're not looking for someone who can work a CRM and make 50 calls a day. We're looking for someone who uses AI to do what a team of 10 used to do — and then closes the deals themselves.

At Penji, we believe the next generation of sales isn't about working harder. It's about building smarter systems. You'll use AI to deeply understand your ICPs, map their workflows, identify their pain before they say a word, and reach them with messaging so precise it doesn't feel like cold outreach at all. Then you'll close them.

If you've ever thought "I could 10x my output if I just had the right systems" — and then actually built those systems — this role was written for you.



About Penji

Since 2017, Penji has given businesses on-demand access to the top 2% of graphic designers. We're the leader in design subscription services, recognized by Inc. Magazine as one of the fastest-growing companies in the country. We're not just building a business — we're building something worth being part of.



What You'll Own

AI-Powered ICP Research & Workflow Mapping

? Use AI to build deep profiles of your ideal prospects — their tools, workflows, team structures, pain points, and buying triggers

? Identify where design bottlenecks live inside an agency or brand before you ever send a message

? Map decision-maker hierarchies and find the right entry point for every account

? Turn a 2-hour research process into a 10-minute one — without losing depth or personalization

Outreach at Massive Scale

? Build and run AI-powered outreach systems across
, LinkedIn, and emerging channels that feel 1:1 even at volume

? Use AI to generate, test, and iterate on messaging angles, subject lines, and hooks faster than any human team could

? Own your own meeting pipeline — no waiting on leads, no excuses. You prospect, you book, you close

? Continuously experiment with new channels and use AI to scale what converts

Sales & Closing

? Run the full sales cycle from first touch to signed contract — demos, objection handling, follow-up, close

? Use AI to anticipate objections before calls, prepare responses, and walk in knowing more about the prospect than they expect

? Maintain a clean, real-time pipeline with next actions on every deal

? Report close rate, deal size, and conversion metrics weekly — and own the numbers

Workflow Building & Continuous Improvement

? Build reusable AI workflows for prospecting, personalization, research, and follow-up that compound over time

? Evaluate new AI sales tools as they launch and implement the ones that give Penji an edge

? Contribute to team prompt libraries, playbooks, and SOPs that raise the floor for everyone

? Get 1?tter every month — in AI, in sales, and in understanding the people you're selling to



What We're Looking For

? 3+ years in sales, business development, or outreach with a proven closing record

? Hands-on experience using AI tools — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or equivalent — specifically applied to sales workflows

? Deep understanding of prompt engineering for prospecting, personalization, objection handling, and sequence building

? Experience with outreach platforms and CRMs — Apollo, Instantly, Smartlead, HubSpot, or similar

? Someone who has actually built AI workflows, not just used AI occasionally

? Sharp written communicator — you write copy that gets replies

? Self-directed, metrics-obsessed, and uncomfortable with stagnation

? Bonus: experience in affiliate or influencer marketing



How to Apply

To ensure your application stands out:

1. Complete the application form:

2 . Attach your portfolio or relevant work samples.

title: REAL ESTATE CLOSER
description:
HIGH PERFORMANCE

REAL ESTATE CLOSER



Warm Leads | High Volume | Real Opportunity



If you need training from scratch, this isn’t for you.





We’re a U.S.-based real estate investment company with a real pipeline already in place:



• Consistent inbound leads

• Pre-qualified motivated sellers

• Clean CRM and structured process

• Dedicated lead management support

• In-house technology built specifically for speed and conversions



You’re not coming in to figure things out.



You’re stepping into a system that already works.



Your job is simple:

Close.





WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



• Talking directly with motivated property owners

• Controlling the conversation and understanding motivation

• Handling objections in real time

• Moving deals toward signed agreements

• Keeping the CRM clean and accurate



This is not a script-reading role.

This is performance-based.





WHAT WE PROVIDE



• Warm inbound + follow-up leads daily

• Fully managed pipeline and backend systems

• Internal data and tech advantage over competitors

• Support team handling data and lead flow

• Clear structure so you can focus on closing



Most closers don’t get access to this kind of setup.





COMPENSATION



• Base: $2,000/month +/-

• Performance bonuses per deal

• Sliding scale pay as you produce more



Top performers make significantly more.



There’s no cap if you can consistently close.





BENEFITS



• Health, dental, and vision coverage

• Weekly in-house training (this is part of our culture)

• Direct access to leadership and deal insights

• Long-term opportunity as we scale



We’re not just hiring.

We’re building a team we plan to keep.





TRAINING & CULTURE



We don’t train beginners.



But if you already know how to close, we’ll make you better.



• Weekly internal training

• Real deal breakdowns

• Live negotiation feedback

• Constant sharpening of your approach



If you’re already good, you’ll improve here.





GROWTH



We’re expanding into multiple markets right now.



There’s real upside here:

• Senior closer roles

• Leadership opportunities

• Being part of new market expansion



If you perform, you grow. Simple.





TRIAL PERIOD



• 2–4 week performance-based trial

• If you perform, you stay and scale

• If not, we part ways quickly



We keep the bar high on purpose.





WHO THIS IS FOR



• You’ve actually closed off-market deals

• You’re confident on the phone

• You know how to control a conversation

• You can handle price objections without freezing

• You push deals forward





NOT FOR YOU IF



• You need scripts

• You avoid tough conversations

• You rely on “follow up later”

• You’ve never actually closed a deal



HOW TO APPLY



Start your application with: Closer



Send:

• Resume

• Voice intro (1–2 minutes)

• Number of deals you’ve personally closed



We’ll run a live roleplay as part of the process.





We’re building a serious acquisitions team.



We invest in systems.

We invest in technology.

We invest in people who produce.



If you can close, this is a real opportunity.



If not, this isn’t the place.

title: Airbnb Support Specialist (Appeals & Review Disputes)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Airbnb support specialist who deeply understands Airbnb’s policies, internal processes, and review dispute system.



Our goal is to improve listing performance by addressing and appealing unfair or policy-violating reviews through proper, compliant channels.



What we’re looking for:



Strong experience working with Airbnb (support, operations, or high-level hosting experience)

Deep understanding of Airbnb’s review policies and content guidelines

Proven experience handling review disputes or appeals

Ability to clearly identify when a review violates Airbnb policy

Strong communication skills for drafting appeal messages



Responsibilities:



Review flagged guest reviews and determine eligibility for removal

Draft and submit professional appeal requests to Airbnb support

Guide our team on best practices to prevent future negative reviews

Help improve our overall listing health and ratings



Important:

We are only interested in ethical and policy-compliant methods. No “workarounds” or policy violations.



To apply, please include:



Your experience with Airbnb (support role, hosting, or other)

Examples of successful review removals or disputes you’ve handled

Your approach to identifying removable reviews



Must be currently working at airbnb

title: PR & Events Team: AI Growth Strategist
description:
About the Job

Most PR teams pitch 20 journalists a week and hope one replies. You'll pitch 200 — and make each one feel like it was written just for them.

Penji is looking for an AI Growth Strategist who uses artificial intelligence to run PR and content outreach at a scale that traditional teams can't compete with. You'll build systems that research media targets in seconds, generate personalized pitches at volume, repurpose every piece of content into a dozen formats, and distribute it all across the channels that matter — without sacrificing quality or authenticity.

This isn't a role for someone who dabbles with AI. This is for someone who has already replaced hours of manual work with systems that run while they sleep — and is hungry to build more.



About Penji

Since 2017, Penji has given businesses on-demand access to the top 2% of graphic designers. We're the leader in design subscription services, recognized by Inc. Magazine as one of the fastest-growing companies in the country. We're not just building a business — we're building something worth being part of.



What You'll Own

AI-Powered PR Outreach at Scale

? Build AI-powered systems to identify, research, and pitch journalists, podcast hosts, newsletter writers, and media contacts at volume — with personalization that doesn't look automated

? Use AI to map the media landscape in your target verticals, surface the right contacts, and find the angle that gets a reply

? Own the full outreach pipeline — list building, sequencing, follow-up, and response management

? Test and iterate on pitch angles, subject lines, and hooks faster than any manual process allows

? Turn one media placement into a system — document what worked and scale it

Content Creation & Repurposing at Scale

? Use AI to transform every long-form asset — podcast, interview, event, webinar — into clips, reels, quote graphics, blog posts,
 copy, and social content

? Produce original written, video, and visual content at speed without sacrificing quality

? Build reusable prompt frameworks and AI workflows that make every content sprint faster than the last

? Know what performs on LinkedIn vs. YouTube vs. TikTok vs. Instagram — and use AI to adapt every piece accordingly

Research & Trend Intelligence

? Use AI to surface emerging topics, competitive angles, and media opportunities before they go mainstream

? Research any target — journalist, podcast host, publication, or brand — in minutes and find the hook that resonates

? Monitor industry conversations and identify PR windows as they open

Workflow Building & Continuous Improvement

? Build and maintain AI-driven workflows that automate research, drafting, repurposing, and scheduling

? Evaluate new AI tools as they launch and implement the ones that give Penji an edge

? Document prompts, playbooks, and SOPs that raise the output ceiling for the entire team

? Track what converts — placements, views, engagement, and downstream customer impact — and act on the data fast



What We're Looking For

? 3+ years in PR, content, growth marketing, or outreach with measurable results

? Deep hands-on experience with AI tools — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, ElevenLabs, Runway, Midjourney, or equivalent

? Someone who has actually built AI outreach or content workflows — not just used AI occasionally

? Strong prompt engineering skills across research, writing, personalization, and content production

? Experience with outreach platforms — Apollo, Instantly, Smartlead, or similar

? Sharp written communicator — you write pitches that get opened and replies that get meetings

? Data-driven mindset — you optimize for placements and conversions, not just impressions

? Bonus: experience in influencer, affiliate, or event-based marketing



How to Apply

To ensure your application stands out:

1. Complete the application form:

2 . Attach your portfolio or relevant work samples.

title: Appointment setter (voice)
description:
HOW TO APPLY



1. Send intro video (use loom)

2. resume

3. whats app info





APPOINTMENT SETTER — SHOOTERS NETWORK

Remote · Base + Commission



About Us

Shooters Network teaches photographers and videographers how to land $3K–$5K/month business retainer clients. We run paid ads daily, generate warm leads consistently, and need a setter who can move fast and book qualified prospects onto our closers' calendars.



The Role

You'll be calling and texting warm leads — people who signed up for our Shooters Masterclass or responded to our ads. Your job is to have a real conversation, qualify them, and book them onto a strategy call with one of our closers.

 Every lead has already raised their hand.



What You'll Do



Call and text warm leads within minutes of them opting in

Qualify prospects based on our criteria before booking

Book calls for same day or next day only

Follow up on no-shows and older leads

Log every touchpoint in GHL after each call

Hit 2–4 qualified sets per day minimum





What You Won't Do



Cold call strangers

Handle pricing or close deals — that's the closer's job

Wing it — we have scripts, playbooks, and a full training system





Compensation



$800–$1,000/month base depending on experience

3–5% commission on every deal that closes from your sets

The base keeps you stable. The commission is where the real upside is.





You're a Fit If:



You speak fluent English — written and spoken

You're available during US business hours

You're fast — speed to lead is non-negotiable in this role

You're organized and log everything without being told

You're hungry to earn more than just your base

You have some experience in outbound calling, setting, or sales

title: Cold Caller & Lead Researcher — Commercial Property Outreach
description:
We're looking for a reliable, motivated Virtual Assistant to research and cold call commercial property owners and property management companies in the Omaha and Lincoln, Nebraska metro areas.

???

, address, property type

???



REQUIREMENTS:

NICE TO HAVE:

???



COMPENSATION:

• Paid weekly or bi-weekly

• 4-5 hours/day, Monday-Friday

• Long-term position for the right person



???



TO APPLY:

Send a message with:



1. Brief intro — who you are and relevant experience

2. Have you done cold calling before? If yes, how many calls per day and what industry?

3. Do you have experience researching/scraping business leads?

4. Send a 30-second voice recording introducing yourself (so we can hear your English)

5. Hours per day you can commit and your timezone

6. When you can start



Generic "I'm interested" messages will be ignored.

title: Pacific Admin Solutions LEGAL ADMIN ASSISTANT (Letter Dictation Role 3)
description:
Rockstar Legal Admin Assistant Needed For Admin Company Servicing Employment Law Firm



Do you want to help top companies defend against Workers’ Compensation claims?



Then we need to work together ASAP.



Don’t miss this.

- Join a fast-growing company working with a top-tier law firm

- Be part of a fun, driven team

- Big opportunities will come from helping us grow

- Long-term position

- Be trained by the best in Workers Compensation defense - we’ll invest in training you

- Be empowered to make decisions

- Have the authority to direct your own path

- Work without being micromanaged

- Work from home

- Emphasis on relative work-life balance in the legal field

- Competitive salary



At Pacific Admin Solutions, we value each of our tea
mbers, and together, we join forces with a top notch law firm in implementing their legal strategies, resulting in out-of-the-box thinking and effective defense of Workers’ Compensation claims.



We work with dedicated and experienced Workers’ Compensation Defense attorneys who work as a cohesive unit to provide unrivaled representation for their clients. The law firm we work with defends every claim with the highest standards.



Our goal is to help our partner attorneys dedicate themselves to their clients’ defense and defend every claim with a unique approach and plan of action.



And to do that, we collaborate with clients to create and implement case specific strategies tailored to reaching favorable results. Come join us in making a difference.



This is a role that will require decision-making, responsibility and independence in your work. We need you to handle the review of attorney-client status letters, involving everything from checking grammar/punctuation of transcribed letters, to then drafting additional letters based on context, to ensuring that all other necessary tasks are being worked on. We want you to play a huge role in things moving forward.



This is an exciting long-term opportunity for you.



Whichever direction your passion and talent take you, we’ll offer you training and mentorship so that you really can live up to your potential.



So, are you ready?



JOB OVERVIEW

Main Responsibilities:

- Reading and comprehending case status reports that have been dictated by an attorney, ensuring that there are no grammar and punctuation mistakes, and cross-referencing to make sure that all names are spelled correctly.

- Following attorney-transcribed instructions to draft any additional letters to different parties and making sure any action items are tasked and being worked on by others.

- Will need to be able to sift through large client files with speed and accuracy.

- Familiarity with law-related parties and terms is not required, but will most certainly help.

- Prioritizing urgent tasks and being able to triage work according to what should be completed first



We’re looking for someone who produces a high level of work with meticulous attention to detail. You will be given a certain amount of independence and responsibility to figure out what you need to do and to do it correctly.



Here are some specific examples of the tasks you’ll be handling:

- Going through a case status report - verbalized by an attorney into a 3rd party app/service, that has been transcribed by that service - to ensure that there are no spelling or grammatical mistakes, and that all party names are spelled correctly. The transcription service is fairly accurate, but there will be mistakes and it is your job to find them and clean up the mess.

- In addition to scanning the status report/letter for standard mistakes, you’ll also need to grasp the context of letter to understand what’s going on at a high level.

- You are going to be asked to prepare further correspondence with the various parties of the cases. These will vary from requesting medicals, prescriptions or MRIs from physicians to inquiring with the adverse attorney or co-party about settlement possibilities, to other legal process follow-ups.



Thanks for reading this far! To apply, as the title/header of your application response, please write "Pacific Admin Solutions’ Rockstar”. Also please send me a video introducing yourself (can be a link to a loom or YT vid) briefly discussing the hardest challenge you have faced and how you overcame it (custom, non-template non-generic video please). Make the video under 2 minutes.



DESCRIPTION OF IDEAL CANDIDATE

- Takes Pride in Mastering the Details

You have an eye for detail. When you say your work is correct, it’s correct. You cross all of your T’s and dot all of your I’s. You will double (or even triple) check your work to make sure that you did it the correct way.



- Listens To Instructions

Double checking your work doesn’t mean anything if you didn’t follow the correct instructions in the first place. You will listen (or read) to the instructions given to you, making sure that you understand the task at hand. And if the task doesn’t make sense to you, you won’t be afraid to ask to make sure you do the job correctly.



- Does the Job Right

You find a sense of accomplishment in ensuring that you do the job correctly, as you were instructed to do. If you have a question during the onboarding or learning process, you aren’t afraid to ask in order to make sure you do the job right.



- Works Well Independently and on a Team

You are able to take on a task when you aren’t given specific instructions for every single detail involved, and can use a higher level understanding to assume responsibility for the work and make proper decisions. At the same time, you are able to work seamlessly with others - you can exercise empathy and teach a teammate that needs help, and show a growth mindset that is receptive to feedback when learning from others.



- Gets Stuff Done

You take charge and get stuff done! You know you can ask for feedback and resources, but you don’t make excuses. You have a passion and an internal drive to make things happen!



- Self Starter

You’re self-motivated, happy working on your own with minimal guidance. You don’t understand why some people just sit there when they haven't been told what to do.



- Thrives With Hard Work

Some people shrink when given a big project. Not you - you say “bring it on!” It’s just one more opportunity to prove what you’re capable of.



- Solves Problems

Reason, logic, and process is your zone of genius. Your friends are often amazed at how you find solutions so quickly, often before they even realize there's a problem.



- Growth-minded

You’re always learning, always growing. If you weren’t, life would be stale and boring.



- Takes Ownership

You love to be in charge, and you want more responsibility. You’re confident to say, “let me handle this.”



- You Do What You Say

If you say you’ll do something, you’ll do it. And if you can’t do it, you’ll say you can’t. (Why do some people make promises they can’t keep?!)



- Pleasure To Work With

Life’s too short to work 
 looking for someone with a positive attitude who knows how to communicate with his/her coworkers.



COMPANY CULTURE

We're transparent; ask if something isn't clear, feel comfortable to express your difference of opinion. We work hard, we have fun, we believe in a fair work-life balance in the legal field.



PAY

Based on ability and experience, ranging from around 35,000-40,000 PHP per month, for this full-time role (depending on a combination of skills, ability and experience). If you believe you have more to offer, tell us what you’d like and why you’re able to deliver more value.



CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS

- Honest

- Reliable

- Hard working

- Attention to Detail

- Fluent in English (written and spoken), near native speaker

- Type 50 WPM

- Own computer capable of handling data entry apps such as adobe reader and excel

- Strong/reliable internet connection

- Good character - *will have to be willing to conduct a background check. This role involves work in the legal field, so you will be dealing with sensitive client and medical provider files.



Preferred:

- Microsoft Office and/or Adobe PDF experience



ADDITIONAL DETAILS

*REQUIRED:

- Internet: Fast, stable connection.

- Computer with sufficient specs to be able to handle adobe and microsoft suites (excel, word)

- Background check (no previous criminal background)



Work Environment: Be able to jump on a zoom video call with coworkers during business hours. Need to be able to respond to work-related chat/email communications in a timely manner.



WORKING HOURS

Full time position (40 hours/week): Working hours are ~Monday - Friday, 8AM - 4PM PHT time (with 2-3 hours on Saturday/Sunday mornings). For this position in particular, the days worked are as noted above, though there will be a lit of bit of flexibility in the tangential hours. PLEASE NOTE that your work days and hours may vary, especially during the initial training period, and/or when having to communicate/coordinate with other tea
mbers/clients.



HOW TO APPLY

Respond to the job post with your resume and any requested information.



We look forward to working with you!



Sean Rose

Pacific Admin Solutions

Jotform (automate lead capture with proper tagging and workflow initiation)

Google Sheets and Drive (automate data export/import for reporting and backups)

Zoom and WebinarJam (webinar registrations and follow-up sequences)

Audit, maintain, and improve current landing pages and website integrations; strong preference for WordPress or similar CMS experience.

Build and maintain detailed, clear documentation for all CRM workflows, automations, and integrations to support scalability and knowledge transfer.

Collaborate closely with the business owner to ensure CRM processes align with sales pipelines and marketing goals.

Provide ongoing CRM system support including monitoring, troubleshooting, and optimization to maximize lead conversion and customer engagement.

Execute light video edits for social media content and basic podcast editing tasks.

Perform general administrative tasks and conduct website research as assigned.



Required Skills and Experience

Proven hands-on experience configuring GoHighLevel CRM for marketing automation and sales pipeline management at an advanced level.

Running
 marketing ads with funnels and pipelines

Strong proficiency with integration tools such as Zapier or equivalent middleware, specifically for integrating GHL with Outlook Calendar, Stripe, PayPal, Jotform, Google Sheets, and webinar platforms.

Solid understanding of payment gateway processes in funnel environments.

Working knowledge of website and CMS management (WordPress strongly preferred).

Experience with video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Filmora, or similar) and podcast audio editing basics.

Strong organizational and documentation skills, capable of translating complex workflows into clear, maintainable documentation.

Ability to work independently, manage time efficiently, and communicate clearly in English.



Preferred Qualifications

Previous remote work experience with international especially australian clients.

Familiarity with communication platforms such as wordpress, simpro would be good. (not neccessary)

Ready and willing to engage in video calls for onboarding and weekly progress updates.



Remuneration & Benefits

Fixed monthly salary of PHP 75,000 paid monthly

Annual 13th month salary equivalent (an extra month's salary once per year)

20 days paid annual leave per year

Health benefit option: annual prepaid medical card worth PHP 5,000

Australian public holidays observed as days off; Philippine public holidays are workdays

Stable full-time employment with 40 hours per week, Monday to Friday, weekends off

Opportunity to work with a reputable Australian company with potential professional growth



How to Apply

Please submit your resume highlighting your expertise with Xero and relevant bookkeeping/accounting experience.
